+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">efc0ddf</code>
+        <span class="subject">feat: 멀티턴 완주 벤치마크(bench_multiturn.py)</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 17:47:34</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">작업을 끝까지 수행시키며 수준별 완주율·턴/액션·에러·시간·비용 측정.
+- 안전·되돌릴 수 있는 기본작업(앱 열기/화면 이동/계산)만, 작업 사이 홈 초기화
+- 완주율=모델 done 선언(자기판단), 실제성공은 저장 최종스크린샷으로 눈검증
+- 연결끊김 재시도 + 작업별 중간저장, 단가 헬퍼는 bench_thinking 재사용</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">tools/bench_multiturn.py | 282 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ 1 file changed, 282 insertions(+)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/tools/bench_multiturn.py b/tools/bench_multiturn.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..03b99cb</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/tools/bench_multiturn.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,282 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+r&quot;&quot;&quot;멀티턴 완주 벤치마크 — 사고 수준이 &#x27;실제 작업 수행&#x27;에 주는 차이 측정.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+bench_thinking.py 가 &#x27;첫 판단 1회&#x27;만 잰다면, 이건 **작업을 끝까지 수행**시키며</span>
+<span class="dl add">+수준별로 완주율·스텝 수·에러·시간·비용을 잰다. 사고 수준의 진짜 값어치</span>
+<span class="dl add">+(실수를 줄여 총 스텝을 줄이는가, 더 잘 끝내는가)가 여기서 드러난다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+⚠ 실제로 기기를 여러 스텝 조작한다. **안전·되돌릴 수 있는 작업만** 쓸 것</span>
+<span class="dl add">+   (앱 열기/화면 이동/계산 등. 구매·결제·전송 금지). 기기 연결 필수, 시간 오래 걸림.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+주의: 첫 줄에 shebang 금지(py 런처가 msys 파이썬으로 실행 → ModuleNotFoundError).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+실행 (repo 루트, py):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    py tools/bench_multiturn.py --levels minimal,low,medium,high --runs 2</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    py tools/bench_multiturn.py --tasks-file safe_tasks.txt --runs 1 --max-turns 10</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    py tools/bench_multiturn.py --out docs/reference/multiturn-bench-2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+지표(수준별):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    완주율   = 모델이 max-turns 안에 done 선언한 비율 (※ 모델 자기 판단.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+               실제 성공은 저장된 최종 스크린샷으로 확인)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    턴/액션  = 완료까지 걸린 API 호출/실행 액션 수 (적을수록 효율적)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    에러     = status=error 로 되먹인 액션 수 (적을수록 정확)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    시간/비용 = 작업당 총 벽시계 시간, 총 토큰 기반 비용</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import argparse</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import sys</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import time</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+_REPO_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+_TOOLS = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+for p in (_REPO_ROOT, _TOOLS):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if p not in sys.path:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        sys.path.insert(0, p)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+except Exception:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    pass</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from dotenv import load_dotenv</span>
+<span class="dl add">+load_dotenv(os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, &quot;.env&quot;))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from cua import (CUClient, initial_input, function_result,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 parse_actions, is_done, final_text)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from live.adb_bridge import ADBBridge</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from bench_thinking import usage_tokens, cost_usd, PRICING  # 단가·토큰 헬퍼 재사용</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+SETTLE_SEC = 0.6</span>
+<span class="dl add">+SHOT_DIR = os.path.join(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    os.environ.get(&quot;TEMP&quot;, _REPO_ROOT), &quot;cua_multiturn_shots&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 안전·되돌릴 수 있는 기본 작업(구매/결제/전송 없음, 상태 변경 최소).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+DEFAULT_TASKS = [</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;설정 앱을 열어 배터리 화면으로 이동해&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;계산기 앱을 열어 15 더하기 27을 계산해&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;시계 앱을 열어 스톱워치 화면으로 이동해&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def call_with_retry(fn, retries=5):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;연결 끊김(슬립/네트워크)에 견디게 지수 백오프 재시도. 논리오류는 즉시 raise.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    delay = 2.0</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for attempt in range(retries + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            return fn()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        except Exception as e:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            name = type(e).__name__</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            transient = any(k in name for k in (&quot;Connection&quot;, &quot;ReadError&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                            &quot;Timeout&quot;, &quot;Remote&quot;)) or &quot;10054&quot; in str(e)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if attempt &gt;= retries or not transient:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                raise</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(f&quot;    (연결 오류 {name} → {delay:.0f}s 후 재시도 &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                  f&quot;{attempt+1}/{retries})&quot;, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            time.sleep(delay)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            delay = min(delay * 2, 30)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def reset_home(bridge):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;작업 사이 초기화: 홈으로. (앱 상태가 다음 작업에 새지 않게)&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for _ in range(2):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        bridge._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;keyevent&quot;, &quot;3&quot;], check=False)  # HOME</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        time.sleep(0.8)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def run_task(client, bridge, task, level, max_turns, tag) -&gt; dict:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;한 작업을 끝까지(또는 max_turns) 수행하며 지표 수집.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    reset_home(bridge)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    time.sleep(0.5)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    acc = {&quot;input&quot;: 0, &quot;output&quot;: 0, &quot;thought&quot;: 0, &quot;total&quot;: 0}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def add(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        tk = usage_tokens(interaction)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for k in acc:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            acc[k] += tk.get(k, 0)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    t0 = time.perf_counter()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    interaction = call_with_retry(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        lambda: client.create(initial_input(task, bridge.screenshot()),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                              thinking_level=level))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    add(interaction)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    prev = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    turns, actions, errors, done = 0, 0, 0, False</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for turn in range(1, max_turns + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if is_done(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            done = True</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            break</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        turns += 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        results = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for action in parse_actions(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            actions += 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;ok&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            handler = getattr(bridge, action.name, None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if handler is None:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: f&quot;Unknown action: {action.name}&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                errors += 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            else:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    out = handler(**action.args)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    if isinstance(out, dict):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                        data.update(out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                except Exception as e:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: str(e)}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    errors += 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            safety_ack = &quot;safety_decision&quot; in action.args</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            time.sleep(SETTLE_SEC)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            results.append(function_result(action.name, action.call_id,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                                           bridge.screenshot(), data, safety_ack))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if not results:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            break</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        interaction = call_with_retry(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            lambda r=results, p=prev: client.create(r, previous_interaction_id=p,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                                                    thinking_level=level))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        add(interaction)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        prev = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    wall = time.perf_counter() - t0</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    # 최종 스크린샷 저장(실제 성공 눈검증용)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    os.makedirs(SHOT_DIR, exist_ok=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    shot_path = os.path.join(SHOT_DIR, f&quot;{tag}.png&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        with open(shot_path, &quot;wb&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f.write(bridge.screenshot())</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    except Exception:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        shot_path = &quot;(캡처 실패)&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return {</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;done&quot;: done, &quot;turns&quot;: turns, &quot;actions&quot;: actions, &quot;errors&quot;: errors,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;wall&quot;: wall, &quot;tok_total&quot;: acc[&quot;total&quot;] or (acc[&quot;input&quot;] + acc[&quot;output&quot;] + acc[&quot;thought&quot;]),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;cost&quot;: cost_usd(acc, PRICE_IN, PRICE_OUT),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;final_text&quot;: (final_text(interaction) or &quot;&quot;)[:80], &quot;shot&quot;: shot_path,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    }</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 단가(모듈 전역; main 에서 세팅)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+PRICE_IN, PRICE_OUT = 0.30, 2.50</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def agg(runs_data) -&gt; dict:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    n = len(runs_data) or 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    s = lambda k: sum(r[k] for r in runs_data)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return {</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;done_rate&quot;: s(&quot;done&quot;) / n, &quot;turns&quot;: s(&quot;turns&quot;) / n,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;actions&quot;: s(&quot;actions&quot;) / n, &quot;errors&quot;: s(&quot;errors&quot;) / n,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;wall&quot;: s(&quot;wall&quot;) / n, &quot;tok_total&quot;: s(&quot;tok_total&quot;) / n,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;cost&quot;: s(&quot;cost&quot;) / n, &quot;n&quot;: n,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    }</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def render_md(results, model, runs, levels) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L = [f&quot;# 멀티턴 완주 벤치마크 — {model}&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 작업 {len(results)}개 · 수준 {levels} · 작업당 {runs}회&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 단가(USD/1M): 입력 {PRICE_IN}, 출력+사고 {PRICE_OUT} (⚠ placeholder, 갱신 필요)&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         &quot;- **완주율 = 모델이 max-turns 안에 done 선언한 비율(자기 판단).** &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         &quot;실제 성공은 저장된 최종 스크린샷으로 확인.&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 최종 스크린샷: `{SHOT_DIR}`&quot;, &quot;&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for i, (task, per_level) in enumerate(results, 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        L += [f&quot;## {i}. {task}&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+              &quot;| 수준 | 완주율 | 평균 턴 | 평균 액션 | 평균 에러 | 시간(s) | 총tok | 비용($) |&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+              &quot;|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            a = per_level[lv]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            L.append(f&quot;| {lv} | {a[&#x27;done_rate&#x27;]*100:.0f}% | {a[&#x27;turns&#x27;]:.1f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                     f&quot;{a[&#x27;actions&#x27;]:.1f} | {a[&#x27;errors&#x27;]:.1f} | {a[&#x27;wall&#x27;]:.1f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                     f&quot;{a[&#x27;tok_total&#x27;]:.0f} | {a[&#x27;cost&#x27;]:.6f} |&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        L.append(&quot;&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    # 수준별 요약(작업 전체 평균)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L += [&quot;## 수준별 요약 (작업 전체 평균)&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+          &quot;| 수준 | 완주율 | 평균 턴 | 평균 액션 | 평균 에러 | 평균 시간(s) | 평균 비용($) |&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+          &quot;|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        picks = [per_level[lv] for _, per_level in results]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        n = len(picks) or 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        m = lambda k: sum(p[k] for p in picks) / n</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        L.append(f&quot;| {lv} | {m(&#x27;done_rate&#x27;)*100:.0f}% | {m(&#x27;turns&#x27;):.1f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 f&quot;{m(&#x27;actions&#x27;):.1f} | {m(&#x27;errors&#x27;):.1f} | {m(&#x27;wall&#x27;):.1f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 f&quot;{m(&#x27;cost&#x27;):.6f} |&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L += [&quot;&quot;, &quot;&gt; 높은 수준이 **액션·에러·턴을 줄이면** 사고 수준이 값어치를 한 것.&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+          &quot;&gt; 첫 판단만 보는 bench_thinking.py 와 함께 해석. 단가는 placeholder.&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return &quot;\n&quot;.join(L) + &quot;\n&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def load_tasks(path):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    import re</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    out = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    with open(path, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for line in f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            s = re.sub(r&quot;^\s*\d+\.\s*&quot;, &quot;&quot;, line.strip())</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if s:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                out.append(s)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return out</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def main():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    global PRICE_IN, PRICE_OUT</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=&quot;멀티턴 완주 벤치(사고 수준별)&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--tasks-file&quot;, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--levels&quot;, default=&quot;minimal,low,medium,high&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--runs&quot;, type=int, default=2)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--max-turns&quot;, type=int, default=12)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--model&quot;, default=&quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--price-in&quot;, type=float, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--price-out&quot;, type=float, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--out&quot;, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    args = ap.parse_args()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    price = PRICING.get(args.model, {&quot;in&quot;: 0.0, &quot;out&quot;: 0.0})</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    PRICE_IN = args.price_in if args.price_in is not None else price[&quot;in&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    PRICE_OUT = args.price_out if args.price_out is not None else price[&quot;out&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    levels = [x.strip().lower() for x in args.levels.split(&quot;,&quot;) if x.strip()]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    tasks = (load_tasks(args.tasks_file if os.path.isabs(args.tasks_file)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+             else os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, args.tasks_file))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+             if args.tasks_file else DEFAULT_TASKS)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    out = None</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if args.out:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        out = args.out if os.path.isabs(args.out) else os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, args.out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out), exist_ok=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    client = CUClient(model=args.model)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    bridge = ADBBridge()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    bridge.ensure_adb_keyboard()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    total = len(tasks) * len(levels) * args.runs</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;모델: {args.model} | 기기: {bridge.width}x{bridge.height}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;작업 {len(tasks)} × 수준 {levels} × {args.runs}회 = {total} 작업-실행&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;최종 스크린샷: {SHOT_DIR}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(&quot;-&quot; * 60)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    results = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for ti, task in enumerate(tasks, 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            per_level = {}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                print(f&quot;\n=== 작업 {ti}/{len(tasks)} [{lv}]: {task} ===&quot;, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                runs_data = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                for r in range(1, args.runs + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    tag = f&quot;t{ti}_{lv}_run{r}&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    m = run_task(client, bridge, task, lv, args.max_turns, tag)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    runs_data.append(m)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    print(f&quot;  run {r}: {&#x27;완주&#x27; if m[&#x27;done&#x27;] else &#x27;미완&#x27;} &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                          f&quot;턴{m[&#x27;turns&#x27;]} 액션{m[&#x27;actions&#x27;]} 에러{m[&#x27;errors&#x27;]} &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                          f&quot;{m[&#x27;wall&#x27;]:.1f}s ${m[&#x27;cost&#x27;]:.6f}&quot;, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                per_level[lv] = agg(runs_data)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            results.append((task, per_level))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if out:  # 작업마다 중간 저장</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                with open(out, &quot;w&quot;, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    f.write(render_md(results, args.model, args.runs, levels))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    finally:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        bridge.restore_keyboard()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    md = render_md(results, args.model, args.runs, levels)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(&quot;\n&quot; + md, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if out:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        with open(out, &quot;w&quot;, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f.write(md)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(f&quot;저장: {out}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if __name__ == &quot;__main__&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    main()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">eb388e5</code>
+        <span class="subject">[auto] 2026-07-15 17:25:42</span><span class="tag auto">auto</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 17:25:42</span>
+      </header>
+      
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">docs/progress/2026-07-15.md | 6 +++++-
+ 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index f5b5be0..0970caa 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> # 진행 기록 — 2026-07-15</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> &gt; 커밋마다 자동 생성됩니다 (`tools/progress_log.py`). 직접 편집하지 마세요.</span>
+<span class="dl del">-&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 9개.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 10개.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## 12:59 · `e7f99f0` — Initial version: cua+live, mobile_agent 원본</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -59,3 +59,7 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## 17:21 · `0f1250c` — fix(bench): 연결 끊김 자동 재시도(지수 백오프)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - `tools/bench_thinking.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 17:25 · `8e9ccfc` — docs: 사고 수준 벤치마크 결과(2026-07-15) — 5개 명령 x 3수준 실측</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `docs/reference/thinking-bench-2026-07-15.md`</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">8e9ccfc</code>
+        <span class="subject">docs: 사고 수준 벤치마크 결과(2026-07-15) — 5개 명령 x 3수준 실측</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 17:25:22</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- 지연은 수준과 무관(네트워크·기본추론 지배), 비용은 사고토큰 따라 증가
+- minimal 사고토큰 항상 0 → 표준 자동화 첫 판단엔 ~30% 저렴, 품질 저하 없음
+- 결론/권장 포함. 단가는 placeholder(공식 가격표로 갱신 필요)</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">docs/reference/thinking-bench-2026-07-15.md | 80 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ 1 file changed, 80 insertions(+)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/reference/thinking-bench-2026-07-15.md b/docs/reference/thinking-bench-2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..fc91467</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/reference/thinking-bench-2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 사고 수준 벤치마크 — gemini-3.5-flash (2026-07-15)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **명령 5개** × 수준 3개(`minimal`/`low`/`medium`) × **3회 평균**</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **측정 단위:** *현재 화면에서 그 명령의 &quot;첫 판단 1회&quot;* 의 지연·토큰. 멀티턴/실제 실행 아님</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  (주문·결제까지 가지 않도록 첫 액션 결정만 측정 — 안전하고 수준 비교엔 충분).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **단가(USD / 1M tok):** 입력 0.30, 출력+사고 2.50 — ⚠ **추정 placeholder**.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  토큰량은 실측이니 [공식 가격표](https://ai.google.dev/pricing)로 단가만 갱신하면 비용이 정확해짐.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **환경:** Galaxy S23(1080×2340) 실기기 캡처. 단, 5번 명령의 low/medium 은 이동 중 기기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  분리로 저장 스크린샷으로 측정(입력 토큰 1174로 동일해 영향 없음).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 명령별 결과 (3회 평균)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 1. 이번주 토요일 수원 날씨 알려줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 평균 비용($) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| minimal | 8.52 | 7.89~9.32 | 1170 | 35 | 0 | 0.000439 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| low | 9.09 | 8.57~9.41 | 1170 | 27 | 156 | 0.000809 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| medium | 8.16 | 7.96~8.31 | 1170 | 32 | 176 | 0.000871 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 2. 유튜브에서 리센느 음악 틀어줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 평균 비용($) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| minimal | 7.47 | 6.77~8.24 | 1170 | 32 | 0 | 0.000432 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| low | 7.57 | 7.22~8.14 | 1170 | 32 | 78 | 0.000626 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| medium | 8.53 | 6.95~10.33 | 1170 | 35 | 90 | 0.000664 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 3. 배달의 민족에서 황금올리브 시켜줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 평균 비용($) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| minimal | 7.87 | 7.68~8.22 | 1175 | 41 | 0 | 0.000454 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| low | 8.01 | 7.68~8.66 | 1175 | 34 | 0 | 0.000437 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| medium | 8.73 | 7.52~10.79 | 1175 | 30 | 82 | 0.000633 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 3번 low 는 사고 토큰이 0 — 모델이 &quot;추론 불필요&quot;로 판단(수준을 켜도 항상 생각하진 않음).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 4. 무신사에서 가장 인기 많은 맨투맨 구매해줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 평균 비용($) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| minimal | 7.89 | 7.77~8.09 | 1174 | 31 | 0 | 0.000430 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| low | 13.20* | 8.27~23.05 | 1174 | 24 | 75 | 0.000600 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| medium | 7.99 | 7.26~9.42 | 1174 | 29 | 57 | 0.000566 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; *4번 low 의 23.05초는 슬립 직전 **네트워크 outlier** 1건 포함. 나머지 2회는 ~8.3초라</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 실제 지연은 ~8초대. (이 사건이 재시도 로직을 넣게 된 계기)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 5. 쿠팡에서 연필 10개 구매하고 싶어</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 평균 비용($) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| minimal | 7.37 | 7.17~7.72 | 1174 | 33 | 0 | 0.000434 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| low | 5.74 | 5.01~6.97 | 1174 | 31 | 40 | 0.000530 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| medium | 4.74 | 4.64~4.84 | 1174 | 26 | 41 | 0.000519 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 수준별 요약 (5개 명령 평균)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 평균 사고tok | 평균 출력tok | 평균 비용($) | 1000회당($) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **minimal** | 7.82 | **0** | 34 | 0.000438 | 0.44 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **low** | 8.72† | 70 | 30 | 0.000600 | 0.60 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **medium** | 7.63 | 89 | 30 | 0.000651 | 0.65 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; †low 평균 지연은 4번의 23초 outlier로 부풀려짐. 그 1건 제외 시 ~7.7초로 minimal·medium과 사실상 동일.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 결론</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+1. **지연은 사고 수준과 뚜렷한 상관이 없다.** 세 수준 모두 평균 ~7.6–7.8초(outlier 보정 후).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+   이 &quot;첫 판단 1회&quot;의 지연은 **네트워크 + 기본 추론**이 지배하며, 사고 수준의 영향은 노이즈에 묻힌다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+2. **비용은 사고 수준에 따라 뚜렷이 증가한다.** 사고 토큰 평균 `minimal 0 → low 70 → medium 89`.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+   → 비용도 `0.44 → 0.60 → 0.65` (1000회당 $, placeholder 단가). **minimal이 약 30~35% 저렴.**</span>
+<span class="dl add">+3. **`minimal`은 사고 토큰이 항상 0** — 이런 표준 자동화(앱 열기/검색/구매 진입)의 첫 판단엔</span>
+<span class="dl add">+   품질 저하 없이 가장 싸다. 공식 문서의 &quot;표준 작업엔 낮은 수준&quot; 권장과 일치.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+4. **수준을 켜도 항상 생각하진 않는다** (3번 low = 0). 모델이 화면 난이도에 따라 자율 조절.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 권장</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 일상적 조작 위주면 **`minimal` 또는 `low`** (`.env` 의 `CU_THINKING_LEVEL`).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 지연이 아니라 **비용**이 사고 수준의 실질 트레이드오프다(이 측정 범위에선).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 단, 이건 **첫 판단 1회** 기준. 애매한 다단계 화면에서의 *정확도*(성공률) 이득은 별도 측정 필요 —</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  높은 수준의 값어치는 &quot;실수를 줄여 총 스텝 수를 줄이는지&quot;에서 나올 수 있다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+*생성: `tools/bench_thinking.py`. 방법·API 규격은 `docs/reference/thinking-level.md` 참고.*</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">1c40b73</code>
+        <span class="subject">[auto] 2026-07-15 17:21:39</span><span class="tag auto">auto</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 17:21:39</span>
+      </header>
+      
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">docs/progress/2026-07-15.md | 6 +++++-
+ 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 7233a71..f5b5be0 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> # 진행 기록 — 2026-07-15</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> &gt; 커밋마다 자동 생성됩니다 (`tools/progress_log.py`). 직접 편집하지 마세요.</span>
+<span class="dl del">-&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 8개.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 9개.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## 12:59 · `e7f99f0` — Initial version: cua+live, mobile_agent 원본</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -55,3 +55,7 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## 16:58 · `c1ac088` — feat(bench): 다중 명령(task 파일) 측정 + 명령별 중간 저장</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - `tools/bench_thinking.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 17:21 · `0f1250c` — fix(bench): 연결 끊김 자동 재시도(지수 백오프)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `tools/bench_thinking.py`</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">0f1250c</code>
+        <span class="subject">fix(bench): 연결 끊김 자동 재시도(지수 백오프)</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 17:21:25</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">슬립/네트워크 블립으로 소켓 리셋(WinError 10054) 시 죽던 문제 해결.
+transient(Connection/ReadError/Timeout/10054)만 재시도, 논리오류는 즉시 raise.
+중간저장(명령별)과 합쳐 이동 중에도 측정 유실 최소화.</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">tools/bench_thinking.py | 24 +++++++++++++++++++++++-
+ 1 file changed, 23 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/tools/bench_thinking.py b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index ff49db5..c7c61d5 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -87,13 +87,35 @@ def cost_usd(tok: dict, price_in: float, price_out: float) -&gt; float:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     return (tok[&quot;input&quot;] * price_in + billed_out * price_out) / 1_000_000</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+def create_with_retry(client, task, shot, level, retries=5):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;연결 끊김(슬립/네트워크 블립)에 견디게 지수백오프 재시도.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    노트북을 덮으면 진행 중 소켓이 리셋(WinError 10054)돼 호출이 죽는다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    깨어난 뒤 재시도하면 이어진다. API 4xx 같은 논리 오류는 즉시 올린다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    delay = 2.0</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for attempt in range(retries + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            return client.create(initial_input(task, shot), thinking_level=level)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        except Exception as e:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            name = type(e).__name__</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            transient = any(k in name for k in (&quot;Connection&quot;, &quot;ReadError&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                            &quot;Timeout&quot;, &quot;Remote&quot;)) or &quot;10054&quot; in str(e)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if attempt &gt;= retries or not transient:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                raise</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(f&quot;    (연결 오류 {name} → {delay:.0f}s 후 재시도 &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                  f&quot;{attempt+1}/{retries})&quot;, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            time.sleep(delay)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            delay = min(delay * 2, 30)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> def measure(client: CUClient, task: str, shot: bytes, level: str, runs: int,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             price_in: float, price_out: float) -&gt; dict:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     lats, toks, costs = [], [], []</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     for i in range(runs):</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         t0 = time.perf_counter()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         # 매번 새 판단(previous_interaction_id 없음)이라 수준 비교가 공정하다.</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        interaction = client.create(initial_input(task, shot), thinking_level=level)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        interaction = create_with_retry(client, task, shot, level)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         lats.append(time.perf_counter() - t0)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         tk = usage_tokens(interaction)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         toks.append(tk)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+

+ 1 file changed, 10 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index ef895cd..7233a71 100644</span>

+<span class="dl ctx"> &gt; 커밋마다 자동 생성됩니다 (`tools/progress_log.py`). 직접 편집하지 마세요.</span>
+<span class="dl del">-&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 6개.</span>

+<span class="dl ctx"> ## 12:59 · `e7f99f0` — Initial version: cua+live, mobile_agent 원본</span>

+<span class="dl add">+## 16:56 · `3df4b0c` — [auto] 2026-07-15 16:56:09 _(auto)_</span>

+<span class="dl add">+## 16:58 · `c1ac088` — feat(bench): 다중 명령(task 파일) 측정 + 명령별 중간 저장</span>

+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">c1ac088</code>
+        <span class="subject">feat(bench): 다중 명령(task 파일) 측정 + 명령별 중간 저장</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 16:58:22</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- --tasks-file 로 여러 명령 반복 측정, 명령별 표 + 수준별 요약(평균) 렌더
+- 명령 하나 끝날 때마다 --out 에 중간 저장 → 도중에 끊겨도 완료분 보존
+- 측정 단위 명시: &#x27;현재 화면에서 첫 판단 1회&#x27;(멀티턴/실제 실행 아님)</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">tools/bench_thinking.py | 27 +++++++++++++++++++--------
+ 1 file changed, 19 insertions(+), 8 deletions(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/tools/bench_thinking.py b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 6de276c..ff49db5 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -199,22 +199,33 @@ def main():</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     print(f&quot;수준: {levels} | 반복: {args.runs} | 총 호출 {total_calls}회&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     print(&quot;-&quot; * 60)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+    out = None</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if args.out:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        out = args.out if os.path.isabs(args.out) else os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, args.out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out), exist_ok=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def save_partial(res, done):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;&quot;&quot;명령 하나 끝날 때마다 중간 저장 → 도중에 끊겨도 완료분은 보존.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if not out:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            return</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        md = render_md(res, args.model, args.runs, price_in, price_out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        note = &quot;&quot; if done else f&quot;\n&gt; ⏳ 진행 중: {len(res)}/{len(tasks)} 명령 완료(중간 저장).\n&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        with open(out, &quot;w&quot;, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f.write(md + note)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     results = []</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     for ti, task in enumerate(tasks, 1):</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        print(f&quot;\n=== 명령 {ti}/{len(tasks)}: {task} ===&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(f&quot;\n=== 명령 {ti}/{len(tasks)}: {task} ===&quot;, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         rows = []</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            print(f&quot;[{lv}] 측정 중...&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(f&quot;[{lv}] 측정 중...&quot;, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             rows.append(measure(client, task, shot, lv, args.runs, price_in, price_out))</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         results.append((task, rows))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        save_partial(results, done=(ti == len(tasks)))   # 매 명령 후 저장</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     md = render_md(results, args.model, args.runs, price_in, price_out)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    print(&quot;\n&quot; + md)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    if args.out:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        out = args.out if os.path.isabs(args.out) else os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, args.out)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out), exist_ok=True)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        with open(out, &quot;w&quot;, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            f.write(md)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(&quot;\n&quot; + md, flush=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if out:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         print(f&quot;저장: {out}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">3df4b0c</code>
