+      </header>
+      
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">docs/progress/2026-07-15.md |  9 ++++++++-
+ task.txt                    |  5 +++++
+ tools/bench_thinking.py     | 77 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++---------------
+ 3 files changed, 75 insertions(+), 16 deletions(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 3de816e..ef895cd 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> # 진행 기록 — 2026-07-15</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> &gt; 커밋마다 자동 생성됩니다 (`tools/progress_log.py`). 직접 편집하지 마세요.</span>
+<span class="dl del">-&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 5개.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 6개.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## 12:59 · `e7f99f0` — Initial version: cua+live, mobile_agent 원본</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -39,3 +39,10 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - `CLAUDE.md`</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - `docs/reference/gemini-computer-use.md`</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - `&quot;\354\260\270\352\263\240 \353\254\270\354\204\234 \353\247\201\355\201\254.txt&quot;`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 16:47 · `e965a4e` — feat: 사고 수준(thinking level) 옵션 + 속도·비용 측정기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `.env.example`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `cua/cu_client.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `docs/reference/thinking-level.md`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `tools/bench_thinking.py`</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/task.txt b/task.txt</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..5b2abe5</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/task.txt</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+1. 이번주 토요일 수원 날씨 알려줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+2. 유튜브에서 리센느 음악 틀어줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+3. 배달의 민족에서 황금올리브 시켜줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+4. 무신사에서 가장 인기 많은 맨투맨 구매해줘</span>
+<span class="dl add">+5.쿠팡에서 연필 10개 구매하고 싶어</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">\ No newline at end of file</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/tools/bench_thinking.py b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 4e636c5..6de276c 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -114,13 +114,9 @@ def measure(client: CUClient, task: str, shot: bytes, level: str, runs: int,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     }</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl del">-def render_md(rows, model, task, runs, price_in, price_out) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    L = [f&quot;# 사고 수준 벤치마크 — {model}&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl del">-         f&quot;- 목표: `{task}`&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl del">-         f&quot;- 수준별 반복: {runs}회 평균&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl del">-         f&quot;- 단가(USD/1M tok): 입력 {price_in}, 출력+사고 {price_out} &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl del">-         f&quot;(⚠ https://ai.google.dev/pricing 에서 확인·갱신)&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl del">-         &quot;| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 총tok | 평균 비용($) |&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def _table(rows) -&gt; list:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;수준별 결과 표(마크다운 라인 리스트).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L = [&quot;| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 총tok | 평균 비용($) |&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">          &quot;|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     for r in rows:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         L.append(</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -128,14 +124,53 @@ def render_md(rows, model, task, runs, price_in, price_out) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             f&quot;{r[&#x27;lat_min&#x27;]:.2f}~{r[&#x27;lat_max&#x27;]:.2f} | {r[&#x27;tok_in&#x27;]:.0f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             f&quot;{r[&#x27;tok_out&#x27;]:.0f} | {r[&#x27;tok_thought&#x27;]:.0f} | {r[&#x27;tok_total&#x27;]:.0f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             f&quot;{r[&#x27;cost_avg&#x27;]:.6f} |&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    L += [&quot;&quot;, &quot;&gt; 사고tok(총thought) 이 수준에 따라 늘면 thinking_level 이 실제로 먹은 것.&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return L</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def render_md(results, model, runs, price_in, price_out) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;results: [(task, rows), ...]. 명령별 표 + 수준별 요약.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L = [f&quot;# 사고 수준 벤치마크 — {model}&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 명령 {len(results)}개 · 수준별 {runs}회 평균&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 단가(USD/1M tok): 입력 {price_in}, 출력+사고 {price_out} &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;(⚠ https://ai.google.dev/pricing 에서 확인·갱신)&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         &quot;- 측정 단위: **현재 화면에서 그 명령의 &#x27;첫 판단 1회&#x27;** (멀티턴/실제 실행 아님)&quot;, &quot;&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for i, (task, rows) in enumerate(results, 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        L += [f&quot;## {i}. {task}&quot;, &quot;&quot;] + _table(rows) + [&quot;&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    # 수준별 요약(명령 전체 평균)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    levels = [r[&quot;level&quot;] for r in results[0][1]] if results else []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L += [&quot;## 수준별 요약 (5개 명령 평균)&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+          &quot;| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 평균 사고tok | 평균 총tok | 평균 비용($) |&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+          &quot;|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        picks = [r for _, rows in results for r in rows if r[&quot;level&quot;] == lv]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        n = len(picks) or 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        L.append(f&quot;| {lv} | {sum(p[&#x27;lat_avg&#x27;] for p in picks)/n:.2f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 f&quot;{sum(p[&#x27;tok_thought&#x27;] for p in picks)/n:.0f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 f&quot;{sum(p[&#x27;tok_total&#x27;] for p in picks)/n:.0f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 f&quot;{sum(p[&#x27;cost_avg&#x27;] for p in picks)/n:.6f} |&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L += [&quot;&quot;, &quot;&gt; 사고tok 이 수준에 따라 늘면 thinking_level 이 실제로 먹은 것.&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">           &quot;&gt; 비용은 토큰×단가이므로 단가만 갱신하면 재계산됨.&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     return &quot;\n&quot;.join(L) + &quot;\n&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+def load_tasks(path: str) -&gt; list:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;task 파일에서 명령들을 읽는다. &#x27;1. &#x27;, &#x27;5.&#x27; 같은 앞 번호는 떼어냄.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    import re</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    out = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    with open(path, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for line in f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            s = re.sub(r&quot;^\s*\d+\.\s*&quot;, &quot;&quot;, line.strip())</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if s:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                out.append(s)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return out</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> def main():</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=&quot;사고 수준별 속도·비용 측정&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     ap.add_argument(&quot;--task&quot;, default=DEFAULT_TASK)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--tasks-file&quot;, default=None,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    help=&quot;명령 목록 파일(줄마다 하나, 앞 번호는 자동 제거). 주면 --task 무시&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     ap.add_argument(&quot;--levels&quot;, default=&quot;minimal,low,medium,high&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     ap.add_argument(&quot;--runs&quot;, type=int, default=3)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     ap.add_argument(&quot;--image&quot;, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -150,18 +185,30 @@ def main():</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     price_out = args.price_out if args.price_out is not None else price[&quot;out&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     levels = [x.strip().lower() for x in args.levels.split(&quot;,&quot;) if x.strip()]</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if args.tasks_file:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        tf = args.tasks_file if os.path.isabs(args.tasks_file) \</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            else os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, args.tasks_file)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        tasks = load_tasks(tf)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    else:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        tasks = [args.task]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     shot = get_screenshot(args.image)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     client = CUClient(model=args.model)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    print(f&quot;모델: {args.model} | 목표: {args.task}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    print(f&quot;수준: {levels} | 반복: {args.runs} | 총 호출 {len(levels) * args.runs}회&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    total_calls = len(tasks) * len(levels) * args.runs</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;모델: {args.model} | 명령 {len(tasks)}개&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;수준: {levels} | 반복: {args.runs} | 총 호출 {total_calls}회&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     print(&quot;-&quot; * 60)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl del">-    rows = []</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        print(f&quot;[{lv}] 측정 중...&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        rows.append(measure(client, args.task, shot, lv, args.runs, price_in, price_out))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    results = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for ti, task in enumerate(tasks, 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(f&quot;\n=== 명령 {ti}/{len(tasks)}: {task} ===&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        rows = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(f&quot;[{lv}] 측정 중...&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            rows.append(measure(client, task, shot, lv, args.runs, price_in, price_out))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        results.append((task, rows))</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl del">-    md = render_md(rows, args.model, args.task, args.runs, price_in, price_out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    md = render_md(results, args.model, args.runs, price_in, price_out)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     print(&quot;\n&quot; + md)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     if args.out:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         out = args.out if os.path.isabs(args.out) else os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, args.out)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">e965a4e</code>
+        <span class="subject">feat: 사고 수준(thinking level) 옵션 + 속도·비용 측정기</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 16:47:17</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- cua/cu_client.py: CUClient 에 thinking_level 지원 (.env CU_THINKING_LEVEL 로도 조절, 기본 미지정=기존동일)
+- tools/bench_thinking.py: 수준별 지연·토큰·비용 측정(같은 스크린샷 1장으로 공정 비교)
+- docs/reference/thinking-level.md: 개념/API규격/적용/측정법 정리
+- .env.example: CU_THINKING_LEVEL 문서화
+- 주의: bench PRICING 은 추정 placeholder(공식 가격표에서 갱신), py 실행 위해 shebang 미사용</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">.env.example                     |   4 ++
+ cua/cu_client.py                 |  28 ++++++++++---
+ docs/reference/thinking-level.md |  96 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ tools/bench_thinking.py          | 175 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ 4 files changed, 298 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/.env.example b/.env.example</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index ee4fb6e..3800a16 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/.env.example</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/.env.example</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -3,3 +3,7 @@ GEMINI_API_KEY=</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> OPENAI_API_KEY=</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> AUX_MODEL=</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 사고 수준(선택): minimal|low|medium|high. 비우면 모델 기본.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# live 전체에 적용됨. 자세한 건 docs/reference/thinking-level.md</span>
+<span class="dl add">+CU_THINKING_LEVEL=</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/cua/cu_client.py b/cua/cu_client.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index b0b35dd..8c43c11 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/cua/cu_client.py</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/cua/cu_client.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -71,30 +71,48 @@ def function_result(name: str, call_id: str, screenshot: Any,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     }</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 사고 수준(thinking level): 판단 전 추론량 ↔ 속도/비용 트레이드오프.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 값은 소문자 &quot;minimal&quot;|&quot;low&quot;|&quot;medium&quot;|&quot;high&quot; (Interactions API 규격).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 문서 권장: 표준 자동화는 낮은 수준이 균형이 좋다. 측정은 tools/bench_thinking.py.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+THINKING_LEVELS = (&quot;minimal&quot;, &quot;low&quot;, &quot;medium&quot;, &quot;high&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> class CUClient:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     &quot;&quot;&quot;Computer Use 호출기.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl del">-    def __init__(self, api_key: Optional[str] = None, model: str = MODEL):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def __init__(self, api_key: Optional[str] = None, model: str = MODEL,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 thinking_level: Optional[str] = None):</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         self.client = genai.Client(api_key=api_key or os.getenv(&quot;GEMINI_API_KEY&quot;))</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         self.model = model</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 기본 사고 수준: 인자 &gt; .env(CU_THINKING_LEVEL) &gt; 미지정(모델 기본).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self.thinking_level = (thinking_level or os.getenv(&quot;CU_THINKING_LEVEL&quot;) or None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if self.thinking_level:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            self.thinking_level = self.thinking_level.lower()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl del">-    def create(self, input: List[dict], previous_interaction_id: Optional[str] = None):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def create(self, input: List[dict], previous_interaction_id: Optional[str] = None,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+               thinking_level: Optional[str] = None):</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         &quot;&quot;&quot;CU 호출 1회. input 은 initial_input(...) 또는 function_result 리스트.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         previous_interaction_id 로 이전 턴을 이어갈 수 있다(라이브 루프용).</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         벤치마크(오프라인)는 스텝당 initial_input 으로 1회만 부르면 된다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        thinking_level 을 주면 이번 호출만 그 수준으로(측정용). 없으면 인스턴스 기본값.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        return self.client.interactions.create(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        kwargs = dict(</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             model=self.model,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             system_instruction=SYSTEM_PROMPT,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             input=input,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             tools=TOOLS,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             previous_interaction_id=previous_interaction_id,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        level = (thinking_level or self.thinking_level)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if level:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            kwargs[&quot;generation_config&quot;] = {&quot;thinking_level&quot;: level.lower()}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return self.client.interactions.create(**kwargs)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     def decide(self, goal: str, screenshot: Any,</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">                history: Optional[List[str]] = None,</span>
+<span class="dl del">-               previous_interaction_id: Optional[str] = None):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+               previous_interaction_id: Optional[str] = None,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+               thinking_level: Optional[str] = None):</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         &quot;&quot;&quot;편의 함수: 목표(+히스토리)+스크린샷으로 바로 1회 호출. [5단계] history 추가&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         return self.create(initial_input(goal, screenshot, history),</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                           previous_interaction_id)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                           previous_interaction_id, thinking_level)</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/reference/thinking-level.md b/docs/reference/thinking-level.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..16f72b1</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/reference/thinking-level.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,96 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 사고 수준(Thinking Level) — 속도·비용 관리</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; Gemini 3.5 Flash Computer Use에서 **판단 전 추론량**을 조절해 품질↔속도/비용을 맞추는 기능.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 개념·API·우리 코드 적용·측정 방법을 한곳에 정리. 관련: [[cu-reference-doc]] (`gemini-computer-use.md`).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 1. 개념</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+모델이 다음 액션을 내기 전에 &quot;얼마나 생각할지&quot;를 단계로 지정한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **높을수록** — 애매·복잡한 화면에서 판단 정확↑, 대신 **느리고 사고 토큰↑(비용↑)**</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **낮을수록** — 빠르고 저렴, 대신 어려운 상황에서 실수 가능성↑</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+공식 문서(Computer Use)의 권장:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 컴퓨터 사용 에이전트는 품질과 실행 속도의 균형을 위해 사고 수준을 구성할 수 있으며,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; **일반적으로 낮은 사고 수준이 표준 자동화 작업에 적합한 균형**을 제공한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+→ &quot;설정 열기/토글&quot; 같은 일상 조작은 낮게, 다단계·추론 많은 작업만 높인다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 2. API 규격 (설치된 google-genai에서 실측)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+Interactions API는 `generation_config`에 **평평하게** 넣는다(중첩 아님):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```python</span>
+<span class="dl add">+client.interactions.create(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    model=&quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    input=...,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    tools=[{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;computer_use&quot;, &quot;environment&quot;: &quot;mobile&quot;}],</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    generation_config={&quot;thinking_level&quot;: &quot;low&quot;},   # ← 이 한 줄</span>
+<span class="dl add">+)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **값(소문자):** `&quot;minimal&quot;` · `&quot;low&quot;` · `&quot;medium&quot;` · `&quot;high&quot;`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  (`google.genai._gaos.types.interactions.thinkinglevel.ThinkingLevel`)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 세밀 제어용으로 `thinking_budget`(토큰 정수, `0`=끔 `-1`=자동)도 스키마에 있으나</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  Computer Use엔 `thinking_level` 사용이 자연스럽다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 주의: 일반 `generate_content`(=`mobile_agent/`)의 `ThinkingConfig`는 `thinking_config`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 아래에 `thinking_level`이 **중첩**된다. 하지만 우리 `live`/`cua`가 쓰는 **Interactions</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; API는 `generation_config.thinking_level`로 평평**하다. 두 API 형태가 다르니 혼동 말 것.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 응답의 토큰 사용량 (`interaction.usage`)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 필드 | 뜻 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `total_input_tokens` | 입력(프롬프트+스크린샷) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `total_output_tokens` | 생성 출력 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `total_thought_tokens` | **사고 토큰** — 수준↑이면 여기서 늘어남 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `total_cached_tokens` | 캐시된 입력 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `total_tokens` | 합계 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+비용 ≈ `입력×단가_in + (출력+사고)×단가_out` (사고 토큰은 출력으로 과금).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 3. 우리 코드 적용</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`cua/cu_client.py`의 `CUClient`에 반영됨(한 곳만 고치면 `live`·벤치 전부 적용):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **우선순위:** `create(..., thinking_level=)` 인자 &gt; 생성자 인자 &gt; **`.env`의 `CU_THINKING_LEVEL`** &gt; 미지정(모델 기본)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `.env`에 `CU_THINKING_LEVEL=low` 한 줄이면 코드 수정 없이 `live` 전체가 그 수준으로 동작.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 미지정이면 `generation_config`를 아예 안 붙여 기존과 100% 동일.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```python</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 예: 라이브를 낮은 수준으로 (빠르게)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+#   .env →  CU_THINKING_LEVEL=low</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 또는 코드에서 직접</span>
+<span class="dl add">+client = CUClient(thinking_level=&quot;low&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 4. 실제 측정 — `tools/bench_thinking.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+같은 스크린샷 1장 + 같은 목표로 **수준만 바꿔** 여러 번 호출해 지연·토큰·비용을 잰다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+한 호출 = &quot;이 화면에서 액션 하나&quot; 판단이라 수준 간 비교가 공정하다(멀티턴 X).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```bash</span>
+<span class="dl add">+py tools/bench_thinking.py --task &quot;설정 앱을 열어&quot; --runs 3</span>
+<span class="dl add">+py tools/bench_thinking.py --levels low,high --runs 5 --image shot.png</span>
+<span class="dl add">+py tools/bench_thinking.py --out docs/reference/thinking-bench-2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `--image PATH` 주면 기기 없이 저장된 PNG로 측정(재현 가능). 없으면 연결된 기기에서 캡처.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 총 호출 수 = `len(levels) × runs` (기본 4×3=12회) — **실호출이라 소량 과금**.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 출력: 수준별 평균 지연(min~max), 입력/출력/사고/총 토큰, 평균 비용($) 표.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### ⚠ 비용 단가 갱신 필요</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`tools/bench_thinking.py`의 `PRICING`은 **추정 placeholder**다. 토큰량은 정확히 재지만</span>
+<span class="dl add">+달러 환산은 이 단가에 의존하므로, 공식 가격표에서 확인해 갱신할 것:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 가격: https://ai.google.dev/pricing</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 갱신 방법: `PRICING[&quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;]`의 `in`/`out`(1M 토큰당 USD) 수정,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  또는 실행 시 `--price-in`/`--price-out`로 덮어쓰기.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 5. 판단 가이드 (측정 후 채우기)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 수준 | 언제 | 기대 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `minimal`/`low` | 일반 앱 조작(권장 기본) | 빠름/저렴 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `medium` | 다소 복잡한 다단계 | 중간 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `high` | 애매한 화면·추론 다수 | 느림/비쌈, 정확도↑ |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+실제 수치는 `bench_thinking.py`로 측정해 이 표 아래에 결과를 붙여 확정한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+사고 토큰이 수준에 따라 실제로 늘어나는지(=옵션이 먹었는지)도 함께 확인.</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/tools/bench_thinking.py b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..4e636c5</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/tools/bench_thinking.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,175 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+r&quot;&quot;&quot;사고 수준(thinking level)별 속도·비용 측정기.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+주의: 첫 줄에 `#!/usr/bin/env python3` shebang 을 두지 말 것. Windows `py` 런처가</span>
+<span class="dl add">+그 줄을 읽고 dotenv/genai 없는 다른 python3(msys2)로 실행해버린다(→ ModuleNotFoundError).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+같은 화면(스크린샷 1장) + 같은 목표로, 사고 수준만 바꿔가며 CU 모델을 여러 번</span>
+<span class="dl add">+호출해 **지연시간(latency)** 과 **토큰 사용량(→ 비용)** 을 잰다. 한 호출 = &quot;이 화면에서</span>
+<span class="dl add">+다음 액션 하나&quot; 판단이라 수준 간 비교가 공정하다(멀티턴 X, 기기 상태 안 바뀜).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+실행 (repo 루트에서, 반드시 `py`):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    py tools/bench_thinking.py --task &quot;설정 앱을 열어&quot; --runs 3</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    py tools/bench_thinking.py --levels low,high --runs 5 --image shot.png</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    py tools/bench_thinking.py --out docs/reference/thinking-bench-2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+옵션:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --task   TEXT     목표 문장 (기본: &quot;설정 앱을 열어 다크 모드를 켜&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --levels L,L,..   측정할 수준 (기본: minimal,low,medium,high)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --runs   N        수준마다 반복 횟수(평균낸다, 기본 3)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --image  PATH     이 PNG 로 측정(기기 불필요). 없으면 연결된 기기에서 1장 캡처</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --price-in  F     입력 100만 토큰당 USD (기본 PRICING, --price 로 덮어씀)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --price-out F     출력+사고 100만 토큰당 USD</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --out    PATH     결과 마크다운 표를 파일로도 저장</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+사전: .env 의 GEMINI_API_KEY. 기기 캡처 시 adb 연결. 실호출이라 소량 과금됨</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      (호출 수 = len(levels) × runs; 기본 4×3 = 12회).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+⚠ 비용 단가(PRICING)는 공식 가격표에서 직접 확인해 갱신할 것. 토큰량은 정확히 재지만</span>
+<span class="dl add">+   달러 환산은 이 단가에 의존한다. 링크: https://ai.google.dev/pricing</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import argparse</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import statistics</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import sys</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import time</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from typing import Optional</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+_REPO_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if _REPO_ROOT not in sys.path:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    sys.path.insert(0, _REPO_ROOT)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+except Exception:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    pass</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from dotenv import load_dotenv</span>
+<span class="dl add">+load_dotenv(os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, &quot;.env&quot;))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from cua import CUClient, initial_input</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 100만 토큰당 USD — ⚠ 공식 가격표(https://ai.google.dev/pricing)에서 확인 후 갱신.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 토큰 수는 정확히 측정되며, 아래 단가만 바꾸면 비용이 재계산된다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+PRICING = {</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;: {&quot;in&quot;: 0.30, &quot;out&quot;: 2.50},  # ← 추정 placeholder, 갱신 필요</span>
+<span class="dl add">+}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+DEFAULT_TASK = &quot;설정 앱을 열어 다크 모드를 켜&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def get_screenshot(image_path: Optional[str]) -&gt; bytes:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;--image 있으면 그 파일, 없으면 연결된 기기에서 1장 캡처.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if image_path:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        with open(image_path, &quot;rb&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            return f.read()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    from live.adb_bridge import ADBBridge</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    bridge = ADBBridge()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;기기에서 스크린샷 캡처... ({bridge.width}x{bridge.height})&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return bridge.screenshot()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def usage_tokens(interaction) -&gt; dict:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;응답의 usage 를 표준 키로 정리. 없으면 0.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    u = getattr(interaction, &quot;usage&quot;, None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    g = lambda name: (getattr(u, name, None) or 0) if u else 0</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return {</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;input&quot;: g(&quot;total_input_tokens&quot;),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;output&quot;: g(&quot;total_output_tokens&quot;),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;thought&quot;: g(&quot;total_thought_tokens&quot;),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;cached&quot;: g(&quot;total_cached_tokens&quot;),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;total&quot;: g(&quot;total_tokens&quot;),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    }</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def cost_usd(tok: dict, price_in: float, price_out: float) -&gt; float:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;비용 = 입력×단가_in + (출력+사고)×단가_out. 사고 토큰은 출력으로 과금.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    billed_out = tok[&quot;output&quot;] + tok[&quot;thought&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return (tok[&quot;input&quot;] * price_in + billed_out * price_out) / 1_000_000</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def measure(client: CUClient, task: str, shot: bytes, level: str, runs: int,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            price_in: float, price_out: float) -&gt; dict:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    lats, toks, costs = [], [], []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for i in range(runs):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        t0 = time.perf_counter()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 매번 새 판단(previous_interaction_id 없음)이라 수준 비교가 공정하다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        interaction = client.create(initial_input(task, shot), thinking_level=level)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        lats.append(time.perf_counter() - t0)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        tk = usage_tokens(interaction)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        toks.append(tk)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        costs.append(cost_usd(tk, price_in, price_out))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(f&quot;  [{level:&lt;7}] run {i+1}/{runs}: {lats[-1]:6.2f}s  &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+              f&quot;in={tk[&#x27;input&#x27;]} out={tk[&#x27;output&#x27;]} thought={tk[&#x27;thought&#x27;]}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    avg = lambda xs: sum(xs) / len(xs) if xs else 0.0</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return {</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;level&quot;: level,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;lat_avg&quot;: avg(lats),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;lat_min&quot;: min(lats), &quot;lat_max&quot;: max(lats),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;lat_std&quot;: statistics.pstdev(lats) if len(lats) &gt; 1 else 0.0,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;tok_in&quot;: avg([t[&quot;input&quot;] for t in toks]),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;tok_out&quot;: avg([t[&quot;output&quot;] for t in toks]),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;tok_thought&quot;: avg([t[&quot;thought&quot;] for t in toks]),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;tok_total&quot;: avg([t[&quot;total&quot;] for t in toks]),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;cost_avg&quot;: avg(costs),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    }</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def render_md(rows, model, task, runs, price_in, price_out) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L = [f&quot;# 사고 수준 벤치마크 — {model}&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 목표: `{task}`&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 수준별 반복: {runs}회 평균&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;- 단가(USD/1M tok): 입력 {price_in}, 출력+사고 {price_out} &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         f&quot;(⚠ https://ai.google.dev/pricing 에서 확인·갱신)&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         &quot;| 수준 | 평균 지연(s) | 지연 min~max | 입력tok | 출력tok | 사고tok | 총tok | 평균 비용($) |&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+         &quot;|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for r in rows:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        L.append(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f&quot;| {r[&#x27;level&#x27;]} | {r[&#x27;lat_avg&#x27;]:.2f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f&quot;{r[&#x27;lat_min&#x27;]:.2f}~{r[&#x27;lat_max&#x27;]:.2f} | {r[&#x27;tok_in&#x27;]:.0f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f&quot;{r[&#x27;tok_out&#x27;]:.0f} | {r[&#x27;tok_thought&#x27;]:.0f} | {r[&#x27;tok_total&#x27;]:.0f} | &quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f&quot;{r[&#x27;cost_avg&#x27;]:.6f} |&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    L += [&quot;&quot;, &quot;&gt; 사고tok(총thought) 이 수준에 따라 늘면 thinking_level 이 실제로 먹은 것.&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+          &quot;&gt; 비용은 토큰×단가이므로 단가만 갱신하면 재계산됨.&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return &quot;\n&quot;.join(L) + &quot;\n&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def main():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=&quot;사고 수준별 속도·비용 측정&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--task&quot;, default=DEFAULT_TASK)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--levels&quot;, default=&quot;minimal,low,medium,high&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--runs&quot;, type=int, default=3)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--image&quot;, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--model&quot;, default=&quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--price-in&quot;, type=float, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--price-out&quot;, type=float, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ap.add_argument(&quot;--out&quot;, default=None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    args = ap.parse_args()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    price = PRICING.get(args.model, {&quot;in&quot;: 0.0, &quot;out&quot;: 0.0})</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    price_in = args.price_in if args.price_in is not None else price[&quot;in&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    price_out = args.price_out if args.price_out is not None else price[&quot;out&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    levels = [x.strip().lower() for x in args.levels.split(&quot;,&quot;) if x.strip()]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    shot = get_screenshot(args.image)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    client = CUClient(model=args.model)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;모델: {args.model} | 목표: {args.task}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;수준: {levels} | 반복: {args.runs} | 총 호출 {len(levels) * args.runs}회&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(&quot;-&quot; * 60)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    rows = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for lv in levels:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(f&quot;[{lv}] 측정 중...&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        rows.append(measure(client, args.task, shot, lv, args.runs, price_in, price_out))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    md = render_md(rows, args.model, args.task, args.runs, price_in, price_out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(&quot;\n&quot; + md)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if args.out:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        out = args.out if os.path.isabs(args.out) else os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, args.out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out), exist_ok=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        with open(out, &quot;w&quot;, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            f.write(md)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(f&quot;저장: {out}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if __name__ == &quot;__main__&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    main()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">e6ef186</code>
+        <span class="subject">[auto] 2026-07-15 16:26:52</span><span class="tag auto">auto</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 16:26:52</span>
+      </header>
+      
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">docs/progress/2026-07-15.md | 8 +++++++-
+ 1 file changed, 7 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index ad1321b..3de816e 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> # 진행 기록 — 2026-07-15</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> &gt; 커밋마다 자동 생성됩니다 (`tools/progress_log.py`). 직접 편집하지 마세요.</span>
+<span class="dl del">-&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 4개.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 5개.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## 12:59 · `e7f99f0` — Initial version: cua+live, mobile_agent 원본</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -33,3 +33,9 @@</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - `CLAUDE.md`</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - `tools/progress_log.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 16:26 · `760297b` — docs: Gemini Computer Use 공식자료 4종 학습·정리(docs/reference) + CLAUDE.md 링크</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `CLAUDE.md`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `docs/reference/gemini-computer-use.md`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `&quot;\354\260\270\352\263\240 \353\254\270\354\204\234 \353\247\201\355\201\254.txt&quot;`</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">760297b</code>
+        <span class="subject">docs: Gemini Computer Use 공식자료 4종 학습·정리(docs/reference) + CLAUDE.md 링크</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 16:26:33</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- DeepMind/3.5 Flash 발표, CU API+safety 문서, android quickstart 레포를 정리
+- 액션 스페이스(mobile), 좌표 정규화, Interactions API 흐름, safety(HITL) 정리
+- quickstart 원본의 click(y,x) 인자순서 뒤집힘 등 우리 코드와의 차이 명시</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">CLAUDE.md                                                                   |   3 +
+ docs/reference/gemini-computer-use.md                                       | 220 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ ...0\270\352\263\240 \353\254\270\354\204\234 \353\247\201\355\201\254.txt&quot; |   4 +
+ 3 files changed, 227 insertions(+)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/CLAUDE.md b/CLAUDE.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index ab98e90..960d757 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/CLAUDE.md</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/CLAUDE.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -36,6 +36,9 @@ It uses `subprocess.run(..., text=True)`, so adb output containing non-ASCII (e.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## Session continuity — read this first</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> **At the start of a session, read the most recent `docs/progress/YYYY-MM-DD.md`** to recover what was done and stay consistent across terminal restarts. These dated files are the durable progress journal (tracked in git), auto-generated from commit history — so write **descriptive commit messages**, since they become the journal entries.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+## Gemini Computer Use reference</span>
+<span class="dl add">+**`docs/reference/gemini-computer-use.md`** distills the 4 official sources (DeepMind/Flash announcements, the CU API + safety docs, and the `gemini-android-computer-use-quickstart` repo our code derives from). Treat it as the *spec* for what this project implements — consult it before adding actions, touching coordinates, or changing the safety/loop flow. Key facts: model `gemini-3.5-flash` with `environment:&quot;mobile&quot;`; actions returned as function_calls dispatched to same-named `ADBBridge` methods; coords 0–1000 normalized; `safety_decision:&quot;require_confirmation&quot;` must be acknowledged (we auto-ack in the demo); the quickstart&#x27;s `click(y, x)` has **swapped arg order** — ours uses `(x, y)`.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ## Automation &amp; repo conventions</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - **Auto-commit:** a `Stop` hook in `.claude/settings.local.json` runs `git add -A` + commits (message `[auto] &lt;timestamp&gt;`) at the end of each turn, only when something changed. Make your own descriptive commits for real work; the hook is a safety net.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> - **On every commit**, `.git/hooks/post-commit` regenerates two things (via `py tools/*.py`):</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/reference/gemini-computer-use.md b/docs/reference/gemini-computer-use.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..e0bb13a</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/reference/gemini-computer-use.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,220 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# Gemini Computer Use — 참고 자료 (프로젝트 레퍼런스)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 출처 4개(`참고 문서 링크.txt`)를 학습해 정리한 내부 참고 문서.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 이 프로젝트(`live/`, `mobile_agent/`)가 무엇을 구현하는지의 **정답지**로 사용한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 새 기능/디버깅 시 여기 표준과 우리 코드가 어긋나지 않는지 먼저 대조할 것.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; **원문 링크**</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 1. [DeepMind 발표 — Gemini 2.5 Computer Use](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/gemini-computer-use-model/)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 2. [Computer Use in Gemini 3.5 Flash](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/introducing-computer-use-gemini-3-5-flash/)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 3. [API 문서 — Computer Use (safety-security)](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/computer-use?hl=ko#safety-security)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 4. [google-gemini/gemini-android-computer-use-quickstart](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-android-computer-use-quickstart) ← **우리 프로젝트의 원형**</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 1. Computer Use 가 뭔가 (한 줄)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+스크린샷 + 목표를 모델에 주면 **UI 액션 하나(function_call)** 를 돌려준다. 그 액션을</span>
+<span class="dl add">+클라이언트(우리는 ADB)가 실행하고 새 스크린샷을 되돌려준다 — 완료/에러/안전중단까지 반복.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+**루프:** `캡처 → 모델 판단 → 실행 → 새 스크린샷 피드백 → 반복`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+우리 코드: `live/main.py`의 `run()`, `mobile_agent/agent.py`가 정확히 이 구조.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 환경(environment) 3종</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| environment | 상태 | 우리 프로젝트 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `browser` | 최적화 (1순위) | 미사용 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `mobile` | 지원 (Android) | **우리가 쓰는 값** |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `desktop` | 3.5 Flash에서 추가 | 미사용 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+도구 설정: `tools=[{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;computer_use&quot;, &quot;environment&quot;: &quot;mobile&quot;}]`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 모델 계보</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `gemini-2.5-computer-use` — 최초 standalone 모델 (Gemini 2.5 Pro 시각·추론 기반)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **`gemini-3.5-flash`** — Computer Use가 **built-in 도구**로 통합됨. browser/mobile/desktop 전부. **← 우리가 쓰는 모델** (`cua/cu_client.py`, `mobile_agent/agent.py`)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `gemini-3-flash-preview`도 지원, `gemini-2.5`는 legacy preview.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 성능/특징 (2.5 발표 기준 참고 수치)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 벤치마크: Online-Mind2Web, WebVoyager, **AndroidWorld**(모바일) 등에서 우위.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 지연/품질: 70%+ 정확도에 ~225초 latency, 동급 최저 지연이라 주장.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 데스크톱 OS 레벨 제어는 2.5에선 미최적화 → 3.5 Flash에서 desktop 추가.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 2. 액션 스페이스 (environment=mobile)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+모델이 돌려주는 function_call 이름 = 우리 `ADBBridge`의 메서드 이름이어야 함</span>
+<span class="dl add">+(**dispatch: `getattr(bridge, action.name)(**action.args)`**).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### mobile 액션 전체 목록</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 액션 | 주요 인자 | 의미 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `click` | `x, y` | 탭 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `type` | `text`, `press_enter?` | 텍스트 입력 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `long_press` | `x, y` | 롱프레스 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `drag_and_drop` | `x, y, destination_x, destination_y` | 드래그 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `press_key` | `key` | 키 입력 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `go_back` | — | 뒤로가기 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `open_app` | `app_name` | 앱 실행 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `list_apps` | — | 설치 앱 목록 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `wait` | `seconds?` | 대기 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `take_screenshot` | — | 스크린샷 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `scroll` | 방향/거리 | 스크롤 (환경에 따라) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; browser 환경엔 추가로 `double_click, right_click, middle_click, move, mouse_down/up,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; navigate, go_forward, hotkey, key_down/up, scroll` 등이 있음 — mobile엔 불필요.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 새 액션 추가 방법 (우리 규칙)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`ADBBridge`에 **CU 액션 이름과 똑같은 이름**의 메서드를 추가한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 여분 인자(`intent`, `safety_decision` 등)는 `**_`로 흡수.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 실패/미지원 액션은 크래시 대신 `{&quot;status&quot;:&quot;error&quot;,...}`로 모델에 피드백 → 자가수정 유도.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 3. 좌표 정규화 ★중요★</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+모델은 **0–1000 정규화 좌표**를 반환한다. (repo 문서엔 0-999로도 표기 — 사실상 동일 스케일)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+실제 픽셀로 환산해야 함:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```python</span>
+<span class="dl add">+px = int(x / 1000 * width)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+py = int(y / 1000 * height)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `live/`: `cua.denormalize(x, y, width, height)`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `mobile_agent/`: `_px()`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 화면 크기는 `adb shell wm size`로 **동적으로** 읽는다 (기기마다 다름).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+⚠️ **원형 repo의 함정:** quickstart의 `click(y, x, **_)`는 **인자 순서가 (y, x)로 뒤바뀌어**</span>
+<span class="dl add">+있다. 우리 코드가 `(x, y)`를 쓰는지 항상 확인. 좌표가 90도 돌아간 듯 오작동하면 이걸 의심.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 4. API 호출 구조 (Interactions API — 서버 관리 히스토리)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`live/`+`cua/`가 쓰는 방식. **`previous_interaction_id`로 맥락을 서버가 관리**.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```python</span>
+<span class="dl add">+client = genai.Client()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 첫 턴: 목표 + 스크린샷</span>
+<span class="dl add">+interaction = client.interactions.create(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    model=&quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    system_instruction=SYSTEM_PROMPT,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    input=user_input,                       # 텍스트 task + PNG 스크린샷</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    tools=[{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;computer_use&quot;, &quot;environment&quot;: &quot;mobile&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            &quot;enable_prompt_injection_detection&quot;: True}],  # 선택</span>
+<span class="dl add">+)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+prev_id = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 응답 파싱</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`interaction.steps` 각 원소:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `step.type == &quot;function_call&quot;` → 실행할 액션. `step.name`, `step.arguments`(kwargs), `step.id`(call_id)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `step.type == &quot;model_output&quot;` → 모델의 설명 텍스트</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **function_call이 하나도 없으면 = 작업 완료** (우리 `is_done()`).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 실행 결과 되돌리기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```python</span>
+<span class="dl add">+result = {</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;function_result&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  &quot;name&quot;: step.name,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  &quot;call_id&quot;: step.id,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  &quot;result&quot;: [</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;text&quot;,  &quot;text&quot;: json.dumps({&quot;url&quot;: ...})},   # 모바일은 url 대신 상태 dict</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;image&quot;, &quot;data&quot;: b64_png, &quot;mime_type&quot;: &quot;image/png&quot;},</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  ],</span>
+<span class="dl add">+}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+interaction = client.interactions.create(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    input=results, previous_interaction_id=prev_id)   # 맥락 이어감</span>
+<span class="dl add">+prev_id = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 스크린샷 캡처(ADB)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```python</span>
+<span class="dl add">+subprocess.run(prefix + [&quot;exec-out&quot;, &quot;screencap&quot;, &quot;-p&quot;], capture_output=True).stdout</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# → raw PNG bytes → base64 인코딩해서 image data로 전송</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; **두 SDK를 섞지 말 것** (CLAUDE.md 참조):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; - `live/`+`cua/` = `client.interactions.create` + `previous_interaction_id` (서버 히스토리)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; - `mobile_agent/` = `client.models.generate_content` + `contents` 직접 누적 (클라 히스토리)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 5. 안전(Safety) — HITL ★반드시 처리★</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### `safety_decision` 필드</span>
+<span class="dl add">+민감/되돌릴 수 없는 액션이면 모델이 function_call 인자에 넣어 반환:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```json</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;safety_decision&quot;: {&quot;explanation&quot;: &quot;...&quot;, &quot;decision&quot;: &quot;require_confirmation&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `general/allow` → 그냥 진행</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `require_confirmation` → **사용자에게 explanation 보여주고 승인받아야** 진행</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 승인 신호 (safety_acknowledgement)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+승인했으면 function_result에 표시해서 돌려준다:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```python</span>
+<span class="dl add">+result_text[&quot;safety_acknowledgement&quot;] = True</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+우리 코드(`live/main.py`)는 **데모라서 자동 승인**(`safety_ack = &quot;safety_decision&quot; in action.args`).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+→ 실제 서비스로 갈 땐 **진짜 사용자 확인 UI로 바꿔야 함**. (지금은 의도적 데모 단축)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 내장 안전 정책 7종 (`disabled_safety_policies`로 선택 해제 가능)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`FINANCIAL_TRANSACTIONS`, `SENSITIVE_DATA_MODIFICATION`, `COMMUNICATION_TOOL`,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`ACCOUNT_CREATION`, `DATA_MODIFICATION`, `USER_CONSENT_MANAGEMENT`,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`LEGAL_TERMS_AND_AGREEMENTS`.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+⚠️ **정책을 꺼도 모델은 여전히 `require_confirmation`을 낼 수 있다.** 앱은 항상 안전 결정을</span>
+<span class="dl add">+처리해야 하며 &quot;정책 껐으니 안전검사 없음&quot;을 가정하면 안 됨.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 프롬프트 인젝션 탐지</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`&quot;enable_prompt_injection_detection&quot;: True` — 스크린샷 픽셀 안에 숨겨진 적대적 명령을</span>
+<span class="dl add">+스캔·차단. 3.5 Flash는 이를 위한 적대적 학습(adversarial training)을 강화.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 강제 확인 케이스 (문서 명시)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+결제/금융, 통신(메시지 전송), 법적 약관 동의, **CAPTCHA 풀기** 등은 반드시 사용자 확인.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 운영 권장</span>
+<span class="dl add">+샌드박스(VM/컨테이너) 실행, 프롬프트·스크린샷·액션 상세 로깅, 입력 새니타이즈,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+출시 전 충분한 테스트.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 6. 원형 repo(quickstart) vs 우리 프로젝트</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 항목 | quickstart(원본) | 우리 프로젝트 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 대상 | Android **에뮬레이터**(`AI_Agent_Phone`) | **실기기**(Galaxy S23) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 패키지 관리 | `uv` + `uv pip` | **`py` 런처**(Python 3.14). `python`은 msys2라 금지 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 파일 | 단일 `agent.py` | 3중 구조: `cua/`(판단) + `live/`(실행) + `mobile_agent/`(모놀리식) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 한글 입력 | 없음(ASCII) | **ADBKeyboard + base64 broadcast** (`ADB_INPUT_B64`) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 자동화 | 없음 | 자동 커밋 훅 + git 리포트 + 날짜별 진행 기록 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### quickstart 셋업 흐름(참고)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+./setup_emulator.sh          # macOS 에뮬 세팅 (우리는 실기기라 불필요)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+export GEMINI_API_KEY=&quot;...&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+uv venv &amp;&amp; source .venv/bin/activate</span>
+<span class="dl add">+uv pip install -r requirements.txt</span>
+<span class="dl add">+python agent.py &quot;task&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+우리 실행: `py live/main.py &quot;작업 설명&quot;` (자세한 건 CLAUDE.md).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 우리가 원본에서 조심해야 할 것</span>
+<span class="dl add">+1. `click(y, x)` 인자 순서 뒤집힘 (§3) — 우리 코드는 `(x, y)` 유지.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+2. 좌표 스케일 0-1000 vs 0-999 혼용 표기 — 정수 나눗셈이라 실질 차이 미미하나 통일.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+3. 원본은 에뮬 전제 — 실기기는 `adb devices` 인증, 화면 크기 동적 조회 필수.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+4. 한글은 원본에 없음 — 우리 base64 broadcast 경로가 표준(§ CLAUDE.md 한글 입력).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 7. 빠른 체크리스트 (새 작업 시작 전)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- [ ] 모델 id `gemini-3.5-flash`, `environment: &quot;mobile&quot;` 맞나</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- [ ] 새 액션이면 `ADBBridge`에 **동명 메서드** 추가했나 (`**_`로 여분 인자 흡수)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- [ ] 좌표를 0-1000 → 픽셀로 denormalize 했나, `(x, y)` 순서 맞나</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- [ ] function_call 없음 = 완료 처리(`is_done`) 되나</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- [ ] `safety_decision` 처리 경로 있나 (데모는 자동승인, 실서비스는 확인 UI)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- [ ] 파이썬은 `py`로 실행하나 (`python`은 msys2 금지)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- [ ] 한글 입력은 ADBKeyboard broadcast 경로 쓰나</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git &quot;a/\354\260\270\352\263\240 \353\254\270\354\204\234 \353\247\201\355\201\254.txt&quot; &quot;b/\354\260\270\352\263\240 \353\254\270\354\204\234 \353\247\201\355\201\254.txt&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..7f06274</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ &quot;b/\354\260\270\352\263\240 \353\254\270\354\204\234 \353\247\201\355\201\254.txt&quot;	</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/gemini-computer-use-model/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/introducing-computer-use-gemini-3-5-flash/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/computer-use?hl=ko#safety-security</span>
+<span class="dl add">+https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-android-computer-use-quickstart/tree/main</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">\ No newline at end of file</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+

+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>

+<span class="dl del">-&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 3개.</span>

+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 14:14 · `0ddffaa` — feat: 날짜별 진행 기록 자동화(docs/progress) + CLAUDE.md</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>

+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">0ddffaa</code>
+        <span class="subject">feat: 날짜별 진행 기록 자동화(docs/progress) + CLAUDE.md</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 14:14:43</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- tools/progress_log.py: 커밋 이력 -&gt; docs/progress/&lt;날짜&gt;.md 생성
+  (진행문서만 건드린 커밋은 제외해 무한 커밋 루프 방지)
+- post-commit 훅에 progress_log 추가(git_report 와 함께 매 커밋 실행)
+- CLAUDE.md: 세션 시작 시 최신 진행 기록 읽기 안내 + 자동화 문서화
+
+Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 &lt;noreply@anthropic.com&gt;</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">CLAUDE.md                   | 46 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ docs/progress/2026-07-15.md | 30 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ tools/progress_log.py       | 96 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ 3 files changed, 172 insertions(+)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/CLAUDE.md b/CLAUDE.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..ab98e90</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/CLAUDE.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# CLAUDE.md</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## What this is</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+Agents that drive a **real Android device via ADB** using Google&#x27;s **Gemini Computer Use (CU)** model (mobile environment). A screenshot + goal go to the model each step; it returns one UI action (click/type/…); the action runs over ADB; repeat until done. There are **three parallel implementations of the same idea** — see `STRUCTURE_COMPARISON.md` for a full side-by-side.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## Commands</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **Use `py`, never `python`.** On this machine PATH `python` is msys2 (no pip / no `google-genai`) and will raise `ModuleNotFoundError: google`. The real interpreter is the `py` launcher (Python 3.14) where `google-genai` + `python-dotenv` are installed.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **Run the live agent:** `py live/main.py &quot;작업 설명&quot;` (from repo root). No arg → defaults to `&quot;Open the Settings app&quot;`.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **Run the monolithic agent:** `py mobile_agent/agent.py` (prompts interactively for the task).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **Regenerate the git change report:** `py tools/git_report.py` (usually automatic — see Automation).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **Prerequisites:** a connected device (`adb devices` shows one), and `GEMINI_API_KEY` in `.env` (copy from `.env.example`).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **No test/build/lint framework.** The only self-tests are `if __name__ == &quot;__main__&quot;` smoke blocks (e.g. `mobile_agent/device.py` prints screen size and taps center).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## Architecture</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### Two codebases, two different Gemini SDKs — do not mix them</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **`cua/` + `live/` (modular):** uses `client.interactions.create` with **server-managed history** via `previous_interaction_id`. `cua/` is a pure *judgment core* (knows nothing about ADB or benchmarks); `live/` is the *execution layer* (ADB) plus the multi-turn loop in `live/main.py`. `live/adb_bridge.py` adds the repo root to `sys.path` to import `cua`.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **`mobile_agent/` (monolith):** uses `client.models.generate_content` with **client-managed history** (it accumulates `contents` itself). Standalone; has its own `ADBBridge` in `device.py`. Keep changes here separate from the `cua`/`live` line.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### Action dispatch (both codebases)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+Actions are dispatched by name: `getattr(bridge, action.name)(**action.args)`. **`ADBBridge` method names must equal CU action names** (`click`, `type`, `long_press`, `drag_and_drop`, `press_key`, `go_back`, `open_app`, `wait`, `list_apps`, `take_screenshot`). To support a new action, add a method of that name; use `**_` to absorb extra args like `intent`. Unknown/failed actions are fed back to the model as `{&quot;status&quot;:&quot;error&quot;,...}` instead of crashing, so the model can self-correct.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### Coordinates</span>
+<span class="dl add">+CU returns **0–1000 normalized** coords. Convert to real pixels with `cua.denormalize(x, y, width, height)` (`live`) or `_px()` (`mobile_agent`). Screen size is read dynamically from `wm size`.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### Korean text input (live)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`live` types via **ADBKeyboard + base64 broadcast** (`am broadcast -a ADB_INPUT_B64 --es msg &lt;base64&gt;`), which bypasses shell parsing so Korean/spaces/special chars survive. `main.py` calls `bridge.ensure_adb_keyboard()` on startup (installs the bundled `live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk` if missing, switches IME, saves the original) and `bridge.restore_keyboard()` in a `finally`. `mobile_agent` has the same mechanism; the older `adb input text` path is ASCII-only.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### Gotcha: `ADBBridge._run` decodes with the OS locale (cp949 here)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+It uses `subprocess.run(..., text=True)`, so adb output containing non-ASCII (e.g. a `uiautomator` XML dump with Korean) will raise `UnicodeDecodeError`. Production paths return ASCII, so this is fine today — but any new feature that parses non-ASCII adb output must read it as UTF-8 explicitly.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## Session continuity — read this first</span>
+<span class="dl add">+**At the start of a session, read the most recent `docs/progress/YYYY-MM-DD.md`** to recover what was done and stay consistent across terminal restarts. These dated files are the durable progress journal (tracked in git), auto-generated from commit history — so write **descriptive commit messages**, since they become the journal entries.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## Automation &amp; repo conventions</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **Auto-commit:** a `Stop` hook in `.claude/settings.local.json` runs `git add -A` + commits (message `[auto] &lt;timestamp&gt;`) at the end of each turn, only when something changed. Make your own descriptive commits for real work; the hook is a safety net.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **On every commit**, `.git/hooks/post-commit` regenerates two things (via `py tools/*.py`):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  - `git_report.html` — self-contained HTML diff viewer. **Gitignored** (artifact) — don&#x27;t commit it.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  - `docs/progress/&lt;date&gt;.md` — dated progress journal. **Tracked** (committed). Generated by `tools/progress_log.py`; **don&#x27;t edit by hand**. Commits that touch *only* `docs/progress/` are excluded from the journal so the file reaches a fixpoint and the Stop hook doesn&#x27;t loop.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- The post-commit hook lives in `.git/` (not tracked); recreate it after a fresh clone.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **Secrets:** `.env` is gitignored; keys are `GEMINI_API_KEY`, plus unused `OPENAI_API_KEY`/`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`/`AUX_MODEL`. `live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk` **is** committed intentionally (offline install).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- Model id in use: `gemini-3.5-flash` (see `cua/cu_client.py` and `mobile_agent/agent.py`).</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..073d95c</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/docs/progress/2026-07-15.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 진행 기록 — 2026-07-15</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 커밋마다 자동 생성됩니다 (`tools/progress_log.py`). 직접 편집하지 마세요.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 3개.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 12:59 · `e7f99f0` — Initial version: cua+live, mobile_agent 원본</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `.env.example`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `.gitignore`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `STRUCTURE_COMPARISON.md`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `cua/__init__.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `cua/actions.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `cua/cu_client.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `cua/prompt.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `live/__init__.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `live/adb_bridge.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `live/main.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `mobile_agent/agent.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `mobile_agent/device.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 13:09 · `c45ca71` — feat: git 변경 리포트 생성기 + post-commit 자동 갱신</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `.gitignore`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `tools/git_report.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 13:14 · `68f9b6b` — feat(live): 한글 타이핑 지원 (ADBKeyboard + base64 broadcast)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `live/adb_bridge.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `live/main.py`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- `live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk`</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/tools/progress_log.py b/tools/progress_log.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..6c9fa5e</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/tools/progress_log.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,96 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+#!/usr/bin/env python3</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;날짜별 진행 기록(docs/progress/YYYY-MM-DD.md)을 git 커밋 이력에서 생성.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+커밋마다 post-commit 훅이 실행 → 터미널이 꺼져도 진행상황이 디스크에 남고,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+git 으로 추적되어 미래 세션이 읽어 프로젝트 일관성을 유지한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+수동 실행:  python tools/progress_log.py</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+무한 커밋 루프 방지: &quot;진행 문서(docs/progress/)만 건드린 커밋&quot;은 기록 대상에서</span>
+<span class="dl add">+제외한다. 그런 커밋은 새 진행 항목을 만들지 않으므로 문서 내용이 안정되어(fixpoint)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+Stop 훅의 자동 커밋이 무한히 이어지지 않는다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import subprocess</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from collections import OrderedDict</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+REPO = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+OUTDIR = os.path.join(REPO, &quot;docs&quot;, &quot;progress&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+PROGRESS_PREFIX = &quot;docs/progress/&quot;      # 이 경로만 바꾼 커밋은 진행 항목에서 제외</span>
+<span class="dl add">+HIDE_FILES = (&quot;docs/progress/&quot;, &quot;git_report.html&quot;)  # 항목의 파일 목록에서 숨김</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+MARK = &quot;\x1e&quot;   # record separator (NUL 은 Windows argv 에 못 넣으므로 사용 불가)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+SEP = &quot;\x1f&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def git(*args) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return subprocess.run(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        [&quot;git&quot;, &quot;-C&quot;, REPO, &quot;--no-pager&quot;, *args],</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        capture_output=True, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;, errors=&quot;replace&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ).stdout or &quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def load_commits():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    out = git(&quot;log&quot;, &quot;--reverse&quot;, &quot;--date=format:%Y-%m-%d %H:%M&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+              f&quot;--pretty=format:{MARK}%H{SEP}%h{SEP}%ad{SEP}%an{SEP}%s&quot;, &quot;--name-only&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    entries, cur = [], None</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for line in out.split(&quot;\n&quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if line.startswith(MARK):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if cur:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                entries.append(cur)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            full, short, ad, an, subj = line[len(MARK):].split(SEP)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            date, _, tm = ad.partition(&quot; &quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            cur = dict(full=full, short=short, date=date, time=tm,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                       author=an, subject=subj, files=[])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        elif line.strip() and cur is not None:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            cur[&quot;files&quot;].append(line.strip())</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if cur:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        entries.append(cur)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return entries</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def is_progress_only(files) -&gt; bool:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return bool(files) and all(f.startswith(PROGRESS_PREFIX) for f in files)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def render(date, commits) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    lines = [f&quot;# 진행 기록 — {date}&quot;, &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+             &quot;&gt; 커밋마다 자동 생성됩니다 (`tools/progress_log.py`). 직접 편집하지 마세요.&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+             f&quot;&gt; 이 날짜의 진행 항목 {len(commits)}개.&quot;, &quot;&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for c in commits:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        auto = &quot; _(auto)_&quot; if c[&quot;subject&quot;].startswith(&quot;[auto]&quot;) else &quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        lines.append(f&quot;## {c[&#x27;time&#x27;]} · `{c[&#x27;short&#x27;]}` — {c[&#x27;subject&#x27;]}{auto}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        shown = [f for f in c[&quot;files&quot;]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 if not any(f.startswith(h) for h in HIDE_FILES)]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if shown:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            lines.append(&quot;&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            lines += [f&quot;- `{f}`&quot; for f in shown]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        lines.append(&quot;&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return &quot;\n&quot;.join(lines).rstrip() + &quot;\n&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def main():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    os.makedirs(OUTDIR, exist_ok=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    by_date = OrderedDict()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for c in load_commits():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if is_progress_only(c[&quot;files&quot;]):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            continue</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        by_date.setdefault(c[&quot;date&quot;], []).append(c)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    written = 0</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for date, commits in by_date.items():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        path = os.path.join(OUTDIR, f&quot;{date}.md&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        content = render(date, commits)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        old = &quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if os.path.exists(path):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            with open(path, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                old = f.read()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if old != content:                       # 변경 없으면 파일 안 건드림(fixpoint 유지)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            with open(path, &quot;w&quot;, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                f.write(content)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            written += 1</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;progress_log: {len(by_date)}개 날짜, {written}개 갱신 -&gt; {OUTDIR}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if __name__ == &quot;__main__&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    main()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">68f9b6b</code>
+        <span class="subject">feat(live): 한글 타이핑 지원 (ADBKeyboard + base64 broadcast)</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 13:14:59</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- adb_bridge: type() 를 base64 broadcast 로 교체(셸 우회 → 한글/특수문자 안전)
+- adb_bridge: ensure_adb_keyboard()/restore_keyboard() 추가
+  - 기기 연결 시 ADBKeyboard 설치 확인, 없으면 번들 APK 자동 설치
+  - IME 전환 전 원래 IME 저장, 종료 시 복원
+- main: 시작 시 ensure_adb_keyboard(), try/finally 로 restore_keyboard() 보장
+- live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk 번들(오프라인 설치용)
+
+실기기(Galaxy S23) 검증: Chrome 주소창에 &#x27;안녕하세요 한글 입력 테스트 123&#x27; 정상 입력, IME 복원 확인.
+
+Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 &lt;noreply@anthropic.com&gt;</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">live/adb_bridge.py          |  49 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++--
+ live/main.py                |  82 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++---------------------------------------
+ live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk | Bin 0 -&gt; 17374 bytes
+ 3 files changed, 90 insertions(+), 41 deletions(-)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/live/adb_bridge.py b/live/adb_bridge.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index cd5f6b5..0c36152 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/live/adb_bridge.py</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/live/adb_bridge.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ main 에서 getattr(bridge, action.name)(**action.args) 로 바로 디스패치</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> 사전 준비: ADB 설치 + 기기 연결(`adb devices`로 확인).</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+import base64</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> import os</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> import re</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> import subprocess</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -43,6 +44,13 @@ def _resolve_adb() -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> ADB_BIN = _resolve_adb()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+# ADBKeyboard: 한글/특수문자를 base64 broadcast 로 안전하게 입력하기 위한 IME.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 기기에 없으면 vendor 에 번들된 APK 를 설치한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+ADBK_PKG = &quot;com.android.adbkeyboard&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+ADBK_IME = &quot;com.android.adbkeyboard/.AdbIME&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+ADBK_APK = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                        &quot;vendor&quot;, &quot;ADBKeyboard.apk&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> class ADBBridge:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     &quot;&quot;&quot;ADB 명령으로 안드로이드 기기를 캡처·조작한다.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -72,14 +80,51 @@ class ADBBridge:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         )</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         return res.stdout</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+    # ── ADBKeyboard(한글 입력) 준비/복원 ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def _is_installed(self, pkg: str) -&gt; bool:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        out = self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;pm&quot;, &quot;list&quot;, &quot;packages&quot;, pkg], check=False)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return f&quot;package:{pkg}&quot; in out</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def _current_ime(self) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;settings&quot;, &quot;get&quot;, &quot;secure&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                          &quot;default_input_method&quot;]).strip()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def ensure_adb_keyboard(self):</span>
