+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;&quot;&quot;기기 연결 시 1회 호출: ADBKeyboard 가 없으면 설치하고 IME 로 전환.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        전환 전 원래 IME 를 _saved_ime 에 저장 → 종료 시 restore_keyboard 로 복원.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if not self._is_installed(ADBK_PKG):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if not os.path.exists(ADBK_APK):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                raise RuntimeError(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    f&quot;ADBKeyboard 미설치이며 번들 APK 도 없음: {ADBK_APK}\n&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    f&quot;  기기에서 base.apk 를 pull 해 그 경로에 두세요.&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(&quot;ADBKeyboard 미설치 → 설치 중...&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            self._run([&quot;install&quot;, &quot;-r&quot;, ADBK_APK])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 원래 IME 저장(이미 ADBKeyboard 면 저장 스킵 → 나중에 자기 자신으로 복원 방지)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        cur = self._current_ime()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if &quot;adbkeyboard&quot; not in cur.lower():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            self._saved_ime = cur</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 새로 설치한 IME 는 enable 먼저 해야 set 가능</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;ime&quot;, &quot;enable&quot;, ADBK_IME], check=False)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;ime&quot;, &quot;set&quot;, ADBK_IME], check=False)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def restore_keyboard(self):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;&quot;&quot;자동화 종료 시: 사람이 쓰던 원래 키보드(IME)로 복원.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if getattr(self, &quot;_saved_ime&quot;, None):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;ime&quot;, &quot;set&quot;, self._saved_ime], check=False)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     # ── CU 액션 핸들러 (메서드명 = CU 액션명, **_ 로 intent 등 흡수) ──</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     def click(self, x, y, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         px, py = denormalize(x, y, self.width, self.height)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;tap&quot;, str(px), str(py)])</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     def type(self, text, press_enter=False, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        # adb input text 는 공백을 %s 로 넣어야 함</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;text&quot;, str(text).replace(&quot; &quot;, &quot;%s&quot;)])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # base64 로 셸 해석을 우회 → 한글/공백/특수문자 안전(ADBKeyboard 가 디코딩해 입력).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # (기존 `input text` 는 ASCII 전용이라 한글이 깨졌음)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        b64 = base64.b64encode(str(text).encode(&quot;utf-8&quot;)).decode()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;am&quot;, &quot;broadcast&quot;, &quot;-a&quot;, &quot;ADB_INPUT_B64&quot;, &quot;--es&quot;, &quot;msg&quot;, b64])</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         if press_enter:</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">             self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;keyevent&quot;, &quot;66&quot;])</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/live/main.py b/live/main.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index f7cb0b3..93b3db9 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/live/main.py</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/live/main.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -35,51 +35,55 @@ SETTLE_SEC = 0.6  # 액션 후 화면이 안정될 때까지 대기</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> def run(task: str, max_turns: int = 30):</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     client = CUClient()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     bridge = ADBBridge()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    bridge.ensure_adb_keyboard()   # 한글 입력용 ADBKeyboard 확인·설치·IME 전환(원래 IME 저장)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     print(f&quot;기기 해상도: {bridge.width}x{bridge.height}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     print(f&quot;작업: {task}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">     print(&quot;-&quot; * 50)</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl del">-    # 첫 턴: 목표 + 현재 스크린샷</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    interaction = client.create(initial_input(task, bridge.screenshot()))</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    prev_id = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl del">-</span>
+<span class="dl del">-    for turn in range(1, max_turns + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        # 완료 판정 = function_call 없음</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        if is_done(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            print(&quot;\n[완료]&quot;, final_text(interaction) or &quot;(작업 완료)&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            return</span>
+<span class="dl del">-</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        # 이번 턴의 액션들을 실행하고 결과(새 스크린샷)를 모음</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        results = []</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        for action in parse_actions(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            print(f&quot;[턴 {turn}] {action.name}({action.args})&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;ok&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            handler = getattr(bridge, action.name, None)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            if handler is None:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: f&quot;Unknown action: {action.name}&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            else:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                try:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                    out = handler(**action.args)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                    if isinstance(out, dict):</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                        data.update(out)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                except Exception as e:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                    data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: str(e)}</span>
+<span class="dl del">-</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            safety_ack = &quot;safety_decision&quot; in action.args  # 데모: 자동 승인</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            time.sleep(SETTLE_SEC)                          # 화면 안정 대기</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            shot = bridge.screenshot()</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            results.append(</span>
+<span class="dl del">-                function_result(action.name, action.call_id, shot, data, safety_ack)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            )</span>
+<span class="dl del">-</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        if not results:</span>
+<span class="dl del">-            break</span>
+<span class="dl del">-</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        # 실행 결과를 되돌려주고 다음 턴 (previous_interaction_id 로 맥락 이어감)</span>
+<span class="dl del">-        interaction = client.create(results, previous_interaction_id=prev_id)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 첫 턴: 목표 + 현재 스크린샷</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        interaction = client.create(initial_input(task, bridge.screenshot()))</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">         prev_id = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl del">-    print(&quot;\n[중단] 최대 턴 도달&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for turn in range(1, max_turns + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            # 완료 판정 = function_call 없음</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if is_done(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                print(&quot;\n[완료]&quot;, final_text(interaction) or &quot;(작업 완료)&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                return</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            # 이번 턴의 액션들을 실행하고 결과(새 스크린샷)를 모음</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            results = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            for action in parse_actions(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                print(f&quot;[턴 {turn}] {action.name}({action.args})&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;ok&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                handler = getattr(bridge, action.name, None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                if handler is None:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: f&quot;Unknown action: {action.name}&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                else:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                        out = handler(**action.args)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                        if isinstance(out, dict):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                            data.update(out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    except Exception as e:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                        data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: str(e)}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                safety_ack = &quot;safety_decision&quot; in action.args  # 데모: 자동 승인</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                time.sleep(SETTLE_SEC)                          # 화면 안정 대기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                shot = bridge.screenshot()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                results.append(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    function_result(action.name, action.call_id, shot, data, safety_ack)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if not results:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                break</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            # 실행 결과를 되돌려주고 다음 턴 (previous_interaction_id 로 맥락 이어감)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            interaction = client.create(results, previous_interaction_id=prev_id)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            prev_id = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(&quot;\n[중단] 최대 턴 도달&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    finally:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        bridge.restore_keyboard()  # 완료·에러·중단 어디서 끝나든 원래 키보드로 복원</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> if __name__ == &quot;__main__&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk b/live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..6e54ba9</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">Binary files /dev/null and b/live/vendor/ADBKeyboard.apk differ</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">c45ca71</code>
+        <span class="subject">feat: git 변경 리포트 생성기 + post-commit 자동 갱신</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 13:09:06</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- tools/git_report.py: git log/diff -&gt; 컬러 HTML(git_report.html)
+- .git/hooks/post-commit: 커밋마다 리포트 자동 갱신
+- .gitignore: git_report.html(생성물) 제외
+
+Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 &lt;noreply@anthropic.com&gt;</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">.gitignore          |   3 ++
+ tools/git_report.py | 171 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ 2 files changed, 174 insertions(+)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/.gitignore b/.gitignore</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 5d9caa9..9ecfa51 100644</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- a/.gitignore</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/.gitignore</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -18,6 +18,9 @@ env/</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> screen.png</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> *.png</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> </span>
+<span class="dl add">+# ── git 변경 리포트(생성물) ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+git_report.html</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> # ── 로컬 IDE/도구 설정 ──</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> .claude/settings.local.json</span>
+<span class="dl ctx"> .vscode/</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/tools/git_report.py b/tools/git_report.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..4ed01a1</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/tools/git_report.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,171 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+#!/usr/bin/env python3</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;git 변경사항을 보기 좋은 단일 HTML(git_report.html)로 생성.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+커밋마다 post-commit 훅이 이 스크립트를 실행해 리포트를 갱신한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+수동 실행도 가능:  python tools/git_report.py [최대커밋수]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 표준 라이브러리만 사용 (외부 패키지 불필요)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 결과 HTML 은 self-contained (CSS/JS 인라인), 오프라인에서 그냥 열면 됨</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- 커밋 목록(최신순) + 파일별 stat + 접이식 컬러 diff</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import html</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import subprocess</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import sys</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from datetime import datetime</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+REPO = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+OUT = os.path.join(REPO, &quot;git_report.html&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+MAX_COMMITS = int(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) &gt; 1 else 100</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 필드 구분자(파일/메시지에 안 나오는 제어문자 사용)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+US, RS = &quot;\x1f&quot;, &quot;\x1e&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def git(*args) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return subprocess.run(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        [&quot;git&quot;, &quot;-C&quot;, REPO, &quot;--no-pager&quot;, *args],</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        capture_output=True, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;, errors=&quot;replace&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ).stdout</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def get_commits():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    fmt = US.join([&quot;%H&quot;, &quot;%h&quot;, &quot;%an&quot;, &quot;%ad&quot;, &quot;%s&quot;, &quot;%b&quot;]) + RS</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    out = git(&quot;log&quot;, f&quot;-n{MAX_COMMITS}&quot;, &quot;--date=format:%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+              f&quot;--pretty=format:{fmt}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    commits = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for rec in out.split(RS):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        rec = rec.strip(&quot;\n&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if not rec.strip():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            continue</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        parts = rec.split(US)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if len(parts) &lt; 6:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            continue</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        full, short, author, date, subject, body = parts[:6]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        commits.append(dict(full=full, short=short, author=author,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                            date=date, subject=subject, body=body.strip()))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return commits</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def diff_to_html(patch: str) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    rows = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for line in patch.split(&quot;\n&quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        cls = &quot;ctx&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if line.startswith(&quot;diff --git&quot;) or line.startswith(&quot;index &quot;) \</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                or line.startswith(&quot;new file&quot;) or line.startswith(&quot;deleted file&quot;) \</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                or line.startswith(&quot;rename &quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            cls = &quot;meta&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        elif line.startswith(&quot;+++&quot;) or line.startswith(&quot;---&quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            cls = &quot;fhead&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        elif line.startswith(&quot;@@&quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            cls = &quot;hunk&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        elif line.startswith(&quot;+&quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            cls = &quot;add&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        elif line.startswith(&quot;-&quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            cls = &quot;del&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        rows.append(f&#x27;&lt;span class=&quot;dl {cls}&quot;&gt;{html.escape(line) or &quot;&amp;nbsp;&quot;}&lt;/span&gt;&#x27;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return &quot;\n&quot;.join(rows)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def commit_block(c) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    stat = git(&quot;show&quot;, &quot;--stat&quot;, &quot;--oneline&quot;, &quot;--format=&quot;, c[&quot;full&quot;]).strip()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    patch = git(&quot;show&quot;, &quot;--no-color&quot;, &quot;--format=&quot;, c[&quot;full&quot;])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    body = f&#x27;&lt;div class=&quot;body&quot;&gt;{html.escape(c[&quot;body&quot;])}&lt;/div&gt;&#x27; if c[&quot;body&quot;] else &quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    is_auto = c[&quot;subject&quot;].startswith(&quot;[auto]&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    tag = &#x27;&lt;span class=&quot;tag auto&quot;&gt;auto&lt;/span&gt;&#x27; if is_auto else &quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return f&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &lt;article class=&quot;commit&quot;&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      &lt;header class=&quot;chead&quot;&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &lt;code class=&quot;hash&quot;&gt;{html.escape(c[&quot;short&quot;])}&lt;/code&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &lt;span class=&quot;subject&quot;&gt;{html.escape(c[&quot;subject&quot;])}&lt;/span&gt;{tag}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &lt;span class=&quot;meta-info&quot;&gt;{html.escape(c[&quot;author&quot;])} · {html.escape(c[&quot;date&quot;])}&lt;/span&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      &lt;/header&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      {body}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      &lt;details&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &lt;summary&gt;변경 파일 / diff 보기&lt;/summary&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &lt;pre class=&quot;stat&quot;&gt;{html.escape(stat)}&lt;/pre&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &lt;pre class=&quot;diff&quot;&gt;{diff_to_html(patch)}&lt;/pre&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      &lt;/details&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &lt;/article&gt;&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def build_html(commits) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    branch = git(&quot;rev-parse&quot;, &quot;--abbrev-ref&quot;, &quot;HEAD&quot;).strip() or &quot;(detached)&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    now = datetime.now().strftime(&quot;%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    blocks = &quot;\n&quot;.join(commit_block(c) for c in commits) or \</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &#x27;&lt;p class=&quot;empty&quot;&gt;커밋이 없습니다.&lt;/p&gt;&#x27;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return f&quot;&quot;&quot;&lt;!doctype html&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;html lang=&quot;ko&quot;&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;head&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;meta charset=&quot;utf-8&quot;&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;meta name=&quot;viewport&quot; content=&quot;width=device-width, initial-scale=1&quot;&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;title&gt;Git 변경 리포트 · {html.escape(os.path.basename(REPO))}&lt;/title&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;style&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  :root {{</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --bg:#0d1117; --panel:#161b22; --border:#30363d; --text:#e6edf3;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --muted:#8b949e; --add-bg:#12261e; --add:#3fb950; --del-bg:#26171c; --del:#f85149;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    --hunk:#58a6ff; --meta:#a371f7; --accent:#58a6ff;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  @media (prefers-color-scheme: light) {{</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    :root {{</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      --bg:#ffffff; --panel:#f6f8fa; --border:#d0d7de; --text:#1f2328;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      --muted:#656d76; --add-bg:#e6ffec; --add:#1a7f37; --del-bg:#ffebe9; --del:#cf222e;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+      --hunk:#0969da; --meta:#8250df; --accent:#0969da;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  * {{ box-sizing:border-box; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  body {{ margin:0; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text);</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    font:14px/1.5 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,&quot;Segoe UI&quot;,system-ui,sans-serif; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  header.top {{ padding:20px 24px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    position:sticky; top:0; background:var(--bg); z-index:5; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  header.top h1 {{ margin:0 0 4px; font-size:18px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  header.top .sub {{ color:var(--muted); font-size:13px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .wrap {{ max-width:1000px; margin:0 auto; padding:16px 24px 60px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .commit {{ background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border);</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    border-radius:8px; margin:12px 0; overflow:hidden; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .chead {{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:12px 16px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .hash {{ background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:6px;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    padding:1px 7px; color:var(--accent); font-size:12px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .subject {{ font-weight:600; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .meta-info {{ color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto; white-space:nowrap; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .tag.auto {{ background:var(--meta); color:#fff; border-radius:10px;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    padding:0 8px; font-size:11px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .body {{ padding:0 16px 8px; color:var(--muted); white-space:pre-wrap; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  details {{ border-top:1px solid var(--border); }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  summary {{ cursor:pointer; padding:8px 16px; color:var(--accent);</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    user-select:none; font-size:13px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  summary:hover {{ background:rgba(128,128,128,.08); }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  pre {{ margin:0; padding:12px 16px; overflow-x:auto;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    font:12px/1.45 ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Consolas,monospace; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  pre.stat {{ color:var(--muted); border-bottom:1px dashed var(--border); }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .dl {{ display:block; white-space:pre; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .add {{ background:var(--add-bg); color:var(--add); }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .del {{ background:var(--del-bg); color:var(--del); }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .hunk {{ color:var(--hunk); }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .meta {{ color:var(--meta); font-weight:600; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .fhead {{ color:var(--muted); }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  .empty {{ color:var(--muted); text-align:center; padding:40px; }}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;/style&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;/head&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;body&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;header class=&quot;top&quot;&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  &lt;h1&gt;📋 Git 변경 리포트 — {html.escape(os.path.basename(REPO))}&lt;/h1&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  &lt;div class=&quot;sub&quot;&gt;branch &lt;b&gt;{html.escape(branch)}&lt;/b&gt; · 커밋 {len(commits)}개 (최신순) · 생성 {now}&lt;/div&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;/header&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;div class=&quot;wrap&quot;&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+{blocks}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;/div&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;/body&gt;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&lt;/html&gt;&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def main():</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    commits = get_commits()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    with open(OUT, &quot;w&quot;, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;) as f:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        f.write(build_html(commits))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;git_report.html 생성 완료 (커밋 {len(commits)}개) -&gt; {OUT}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if __name__ == &quot;__main__&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    main()</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">&nbsp;</span></pre>
+      </details>
+    </article>
+
+    <article class="commit">
+      <header class="chead">
+        <code class="hash">e7f99f0</code>
+        <span class="subject">Initial version: cua+live, mobile_agent 원본</span>
+        <span class="meta-info">Simson · 2026-07-15 12:59:19</span>
+      </header>
+      <div class="body">- cua/: Gemini Computer Use 판단 코어 (cu_client, actions, prompt)
+- live/: 실제 기기 실행부 (adb_bridge, main)
+- mobile_agent/: 모놀리식 원본 (agent, device)
+- STRUCTURE_COMPARISON.md: 두 구조 비교 문서
+- .gitignore/.env.example: 비밀(.env) 제외
+
+Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 &lt;noreply@anthropic.com&gt;</div>
+      <details>
+        <summary>변경 파일 / diff 보기</summary>
+        <pre class="stat">.env.example            |   5 ++++
+ .gitignore              |  24 ++++++++++++++++
+ STRUCTURE_COMPARISON.md | 124 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ cua/__init__.py         |  26 ++++++++++++++++++
+ cua/actions.py          |  68 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ cua/cu_client.py        | 100 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ cua/prompt.py           |  14 ++++++++++
+ live/__init__.py        |   5 ++++
+ live/adb_bridge.py      | 124 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ live/main.py            |  87 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ mobile_agent/agent.py   | 125 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ mobile_agent/device.py  | 131 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
+ 12 files changed, 833 insertions(+)</pre>
+        <pre class="diff"><span class="dl meta">diff --git a/.env.example b/.env.example</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..ee4fb6e</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/.env.example</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 실제 키는 .env 에 채우세요 (.env 는 git 에 커밋되지 않습니다)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+GEMINI_API_KEY=</span>
+<span class="dl add">+OPENAI_API_KEY=</span>
+<span class="dl add">+ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=</span>
+<span class="dl add">+AUX_MODEL=</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/.gitignore b/.gitignore</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..5d9caa9</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/.gitignore</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# ── 비밀/환경변수 (절대 커밋 금지) ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+.env</span>
+<span class="dl add">+.env.*</span>
+<span class="dl add">+!.env.example</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# ── 파이썬 캐시/빌드 ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+__pycache__/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+*.py[cod]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+*.egg-info/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+.pytest_cache/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# ── 가상환경 ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+.venv/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+venv/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+env/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# ── 실행 중 생성물 ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+screen.png</span>
+<span class="dl add">+*.png</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# ── 로컬 IDE/도구 설정 ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+.claude/settings.local.json</span>
+<span class="dl add">+.vscode/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+.idea/</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/STRUCTURE_COMPARISON.md b/STRUCTURE_COMPARISON.md</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..61ce0b9</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/STRUCTURE_COMPARISON.md</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# 구조 비교: `mobile_agent` vs `cua + live`</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+두 코드베이스 모두 **Gemini Computer Use(CU) 모델로 실제 안드로이드 기기를 ADB로 조작하는 에이전트**라는 동일한 목적을 가진다. 하지만 설계 철학이 다르다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **`mobile_agent`** — 한 폴더 2파일의 **모놀리식(monolithic)** 구조. 실행 스크립트 하나에 루프·안전확인·재시도가 다 들어있음.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **`cua + live`** — **판단 코어(`cua`)와 실행부(`live`)를 분리**한 모듈형 구조. `cua`는 벤치마크/기기와 무관한 순수 판단 코어로 재활용을 노림.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 1. 파일 구조 한눈에</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### `mobile_agent/` (2 파일)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+mobile_agent/</span>
+<span class="dl add">+├── agent.py     # 진입점 + 멀티턴 루프 + 안전확인(HITL) + 재시도 + 프롬프트</span>
+<span class="dl add">+└── device.py    # ADBBridge (화면 캡처·탭·입력·앱실행 등 실제 조작)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### `cua + live` (2 패키지, 6 파일)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+cua/                 # 판단 코어 (benchmark·device 무관, 재활용 목적)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+├── __init__.py      # 공개 API 재노출</span>
+<span class="dl add">+├── cu_client.py     # CUClient — Gemini CU API 래퍼 + 입력/결과 블록 빌더</span>
+<span class="dl add">+├── actions.py       # CUAction dataclass + 응답 파싱 + 좌표 변환(denormalize)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+└── prompt.py        # SYSTEM_PROMPT (최소 지시)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+live/                # 실행부 (실제 기기 루프)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+├── __init__.py</span>
+<span class="dl add">+├── adb_bridge.py    # ADBBridge (실제 조작) — cua.denormalize 사용</span>
+<span class="dl add">+└── main.py          # 진입점 + 멀티턴 루프</span>
+<span class="dl add">+```</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 2. 관심사 분리(Separation of Concerns) 비교</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 관심사 | `mobile_agent` | `cua + live` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **API 호출** | `agent.py` 내부 인라인 | `cua/cu_client.py` (`CUClient`) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **응답 파싱** | `agent.py` 루프 안에서 직접 순회 | `cua/actions.py` (`parse_actions`, `is_done`, `final_text`) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **프롬프트** | `agent.py` 안 상수 | `cua/prompt.py` (별도 파일) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **좌표 변환** | `device.py`의 `_px()` (기기에 종속) | `cua/actions.py`의 `denormalize()` (기기 무관, 소비자가 크기 전달) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **기기 조작** | `device.py` (`ADBBridge`) | `live/adb_bridge.py` (`ADBBridge`) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **루프/진입점** | `agent.py` | `live/main.py` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 핵심 차이: `mobile_agent`는 &quot;판단&quot;과 &quot;실행&quot;이 `agent.py` 한 파일에 얽혀 있고, `cua+live`는 판단(`cua`)을 순수 라이브러리로 떼어내 라이브 실행(`live`)과 벤치마크가 **같은 코어를 공유**하도록 설계됨.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 3. API 호출 방식의 근본적 차이 ⭐</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+두 구조가 **서로 다른 Gemini SDK API**를 쓴다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| | `mobile_agent` | `cua + live` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| API | `client.models.generate_content` | `client.interactions.create` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 히스토리 관리 | **클라이언트(직접 `contents` 누적)** | **서버(`previous_interaction_id`)** |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 도구 정의 | `types.Tool(computer_use=...)` (typed) | `[{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;computer_use&quot;,&quot;environment&quot;:&quot;mobile&quot;}]` (dict) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 완료 판정 | `function_call` part 없음 | `is_done()` = `function_call` 스텝 없음 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 재시도 | ✅ `generate_with_retry` (429/5xx 대기·재시도) | ❌ 없음 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`mobile_agent`는 히스토리를 스스로 관리해서 **재시도 유지 + 토큰 절감용 가지치기가 가능**하다고 주석에 명시. `cua+live`는 서버가 맥락을 이어줘 코드가 단순.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 4. `ADBBridge` 구현 차이</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 항목 | `mobile_agent/device.py` | `live/adb_bridge.py` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| adb 경로 | **하드코딩** (`C:\Users\shimw\...adb.exe`) | **자동 탐색** (`which(&quot;adb&quot;)` → SDK 기본경로 → PATH) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 스크린샷 | bytes 반환 **+ `screen.png` 파일 저장** | bytes만 반환 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 좌표 변환 | 내부 `_px()` 메서드 | 외부 `cua.denormalize()` 호출 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| **한글 입력** | ✅ **ADBKeyboard + base64 broadcast** (한글/특수문자 안전) | ❌ `input text`(공백→`%s`, ASCII 전용) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 키보드 복원 | ✅ `enable/restore_keyboard` (원래 IME 저장·복원) | ❌ 없음 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `open_app` 검증 | 검증 없이 실행 | &quot;No activities found&quot; 감지 시 예외 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `list_apps` | ❌ (excluded) | ✅ 구현 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `take_screenshot` | ❌ (excluded) | ✅ (no-op) 구현 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| `press_key` 미지원키 | 무시(안전) | 원본 키 그대로 전달 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&gt; 가장 실용적 차이: **`mobile_agent`만 한글 입력을 제대로 처리**한다(ADBKeyboard + base64). `live`는 `adb input text`라 한글이 깨질 수 있음.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 5. 안전(Safety) / HITL 비교</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| | `mobile_agent` | `cua + live` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 안전확인 | ✅ **`y/n` 사용자 확인**(Human-in-the-loop) 후 진행 | ⚠️ `safety_decision` 있으면 **자동 승인**(데모용) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 키보드 복원 | ✅ `try/finally`로 무조건 복원 | ❌ |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+`mobile_agent`가 안전 측면에서 더 보수적(사용자에게 물음). `live`는 데모 편의로 자동 승인.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 6. 루프 구조</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| | `mobile_agent` | `cua + live` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 최대 스텝 | `for step in range(1,16)` (15스텝) + `for-else`로 미완료 판정 | `for turn in range(1, max_turns+1)` (기본 30턴) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 입력 방식 | `input()` 대화형 프롬프트 | `sys.argv` 커맨드라인 인자 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 액션 디스패치 | `getattr(bridge, fc.name)(**args)` | `getattr(bridge, action.name)(**action.args)` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 결과 되먹임 | `FunctionResponse` + 새 스크린샷 | `function_result()` 헬퍼 + 새 스크린샷 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 화면 안정 대기 | `time.sleep(0.5)` | `SETTLE_SEC = 0.6` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+디스패치 패턴(`getattr` + try/except로 크래시 대신 에러 되먹임)은 **두 구조가 동일**하다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+---</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+## 7. 종합 정리</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 관점 | `mobile_agent` | `cua + live` |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+|---|---|---|</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 설계 | 모놀리식, 단일 실행 스크립트 | 모듈형, 판단/실행 분리 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 재사용성 | 낮음(한 덩어리) | 높음(`cua` 코어를 live·벤치마크가 공유) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 견고성 | ✅ 재시도, ✅ 한글입력, ✅ 키보드복원, ✅ HITL | 이 4가지 없음(대신 자동 탐색·검증·list_apps 보유) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 안전성 | 사용자 y/n 확인 | 자동 승인(데모) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 이식성 | adb 경로 하드코딩(윈도우 종속) | adb 자동 탐색(이식성 ↑) |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+| 실행 방식 | 대화형 `input()` | CLI 인자 |</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+### 한 줄 결론</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **`mobile_agent`** = 실전 운용에 강한 **단일 완성형 스크립트** (재시도·한글·안전확인·키보드복원 등 실전 방어장치가 촘촘함).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- **`cua + live`** = **판단 코어를 라이브러리로 분리**해 라이브 실행과 벤치마크가 공유하도록 만든 **확장·재사용 지향 아키텍처** (대신 한글입력·재시도·HITL 같은 실전 방어장치는 아직 얇음).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+두 구조를 합치면 이상적: **`cua+live`의 모듈형 뼈대 + `mobile_agent`의 실전 방어장치(재시도·ADBKeyboard 한글입력·키보드 복원·HITL 안전확인)**.</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/cua/__init__.py b/cua/__init__.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..5f798c8</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/cua/__init__.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;cua — Gemini Computer Use 판단 코어 (benchmark/device 무관, 재활용 가능).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+라이브(live/)와 벤치마크(mobibench/cu_agent.py)가 이 코어를 공유한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from .cu_client import (</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    CUClient, initial_input, image_block, to_b64, function_result, MODEL, TOOLS,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from .actions import CUAction, parse_actions, is_done, final_text, denormalize</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from .prompt import SYSTEM_PROMPT</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+__all__ = [</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;CUClient&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;initial_input&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;image_block&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;to_b64&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;function_result&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;MODEL&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;TOOLS&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;CUAction&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;parse_actions&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;is_done&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;final_text&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;denormalize&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;SYSTEM_PROMPT&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+]</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/cua/actions.py b/cua/actions.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..483da5f</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/cua/actions.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse a Computer Use interaction response into neutral actions.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+이 모듈은 benchmark도 device도 모른다 (중립). 그냥 CU 응답(Interaction)을</span>
+<span class="dl add">+받아서 우리가 다루기 쉬운 형태(CUAction)로 바꾸고, 좌표 변환 유틸을 제공한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+CU 모바일 액션(원문 확인): click, type, long_press, drag_and_drop,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+press_key, go_back, wait, open_app, list_apps, take_screenshot.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  - 좌표는 0-1000 정규화 값 (x, y 는 args 안에 들어옴)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+  - scroll 은 없음 → 스와이프는 drag_and_drop 으로 표현됨</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from dataclasses import dataclass, field</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from typing import Any, Dict, List</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+@dataclass</span>
+<span class="dl add">+class CUAction:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;CU가 뱉은 function_call 하나를 SDK 독립적으로 담는 그릇.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    args 안의 좌표(x, y 등)는 0-1000 정규화 값 그대로 보존한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    실제 픽셀 변환은 소비자(live/adb_bridge, benchmark/cu_agent)가</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    자기 화면 크기로 수행한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    name: str                       # &quot;click&quot;, &quot;type&quot;, &quot;drag_and_drop&quot;, ...</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    args: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    call_id: str = &quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    intent: str = &quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def parse_actions(interaction) -&gt; List[CUAction]:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;Interaction.steps 에서 function_call 스텝만 뽑아 CUAction 리스트로.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    actions: List[CUAction] = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for step in interaction.steps:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if step.type == &quot;function_call&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            args = dict(step.arguments) if step.arguments else {}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            actions.append(CUAction(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                name=step.name,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                args=args,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                call_id=getattr(step, &quot;id&quot;, &quot;&quot;) or &quot;&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                intent=args.get(&quot;intent&quot;, &quot;&quot;),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            ))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return actions</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def is_done(interaction) -&gt; bool:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;완료 판정 = function_call 스텝이 하나도 없음 (모델이 텍스트만 뱉음).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return not any(step.type == &quot;function_call&quot; for step in interaction.steps)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def final_text(interaction) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;완료 시 model_output 스텝들의 텍스트를 모아 반환.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    parts: List[str] = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for step in interaction.steps:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if step.type == &quot;model_output&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            for block in getattr(step, &quot;content&quot;, None) or []:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                if getattr(block, &quot;type&quot;, None) == &quot;text&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    parts.append(block.text)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return &quot; &quot;.join(parts).strip()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def denormalize(x: int, y: int, width: int, height: int) -&gt; tuple[int, int]:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;0-1000 정규화 좌표 → 실제 픽셀. (레퍼런스 _px 와 동일: /1000)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    소비자가 자기 화면 크기(width, height)로 호출한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    px = int(int(x) / 1000 * width)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    py = int(int(y) / 1000 * height)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return px, py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/cua/cu_client.py b/cua/cu_client.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..b0b35dd</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/cua/cu_client.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,100 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;Thin wrapper around the Gemini Computer Use API (mobile environment).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+benchmark도 device도 모르는 순수 판단 코어. 스크린샷+목표를 주면</span>
+<span class="dl add">+CU 모델을 호출해 Interaction(응답)을 돌려준다. 실제 파싱은 actions.py 가,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+실행/채점은 소비자(live, cu_agent)가 담당한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+smoke test(cu_smoke_test.py)로 검증된 호출 방식과 동일하다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import base64</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import json</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from typing import Any, List, Optional</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from google import genai</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from .prompt import SYSTEM_PROMPT</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+MODEL = &quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+TOOLS = [{&quot;type&quot;: &quot;computer_use&quot;, &quot;environment&quot;: &quot;mobile&quot;}]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def to_b64(image: Any) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;이미지를 base64 문자열로. bytes 면 인코딩, 이미 str 이면 그대로.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if isinstance(image, str):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return image</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return base64.b64encode(image).decode()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def image_block(image: Any) -&gt; dict:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;image&quot;, &quot;data&quot;: to_b64(image), &quot;mime_type&quot;: &quot;image/png&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def initial_input(goal: str, screenshot: Any,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                  history: Optional[List[str]] = None) -&gt; List[dict]:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;첫 턴 입력: 목표(+진행 히스토리) + 스크린샷(image).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    [5단계] history: 지금까지 밟은 스텝 요약 리스트. 주면 목표 텍스트에 덧붙여</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    모델이 진행 상황(맥락)을 알게 한다 → back/scroll 오예측 감소.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    text = f&quot;Task: {goal}&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if history:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        steps = &quot;\n&quot;.join(f&quot;Step {i + 1}. {s}&quot; for i, s in enumerate(history))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        text += (&quot;\n\nSteps already done:\n&quot; + steps</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                 + &quot;\n\nNow choose the next single action for the current screen.&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return [</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;text&quot;, &quot;text&quot;: text},</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        image_block(screenshot),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    ]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def function_result(name: str, call_id: str, screenshot: Any,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    result_data: Optional[dict] = None,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    safety_ack: bool = False) -&gt; dict:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;[라이브 루프용] 액션 실행 결과 + 새 스크린샷을 CU에 되돌려줄 블록.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    safety_ack=True 면 safety_acknowledgement 를 붙여 자동 승인(데모용).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    벤치마크(오프라인, 단일 호출)는 이걸 안 쓴다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    data = dict(result_data or {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;ok&quot;})</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if safety_ack:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        data[&quot;safety_acknowledgement&quot;] = True</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return {</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;function_result&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;name&quot;: name,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;call_id&quot;: call_id,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;result&quot;: [</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            {&quot;type&quot;: &quot;text&quot;, &quot;text&quot;: json.dumps(data)},</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            image_block(screenshot),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        ],</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    }</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+class CUClient:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;Computer Use 호출기.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def __init__(self, api_key: Optional[str] = None, model: str = MODEL):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self.client = genai.Client(api_key=api_key or os.getenv(&quot;GEMINI_API_KEY&quot;))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self.model = model</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def create(self, input: List[dict], previous_interaction_id: Optional[str] = None):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;&quot;&quot;CU 호출 1회. input 은 initial_input(...) 또는 function_result 리스트.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        previous_interaction_id 로 이전 턴을 이어갈 수 있다(라이브 루프용).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        벤치마크(오프라인)는 스텝당 initial_input 으로 1회만 부르면 된다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return self.client.interactions.create(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            model=self.model,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            system_instruction=SYSTEM_PROMPT,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            input=input,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            tools=TOOLS,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            previous_interaction_id=previous_interaction_id,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def decide(self, goal: str, screenshot: Any,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+               history: Optional[List[str]] = None,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+               previous_interaction_id: Optional[str] = None):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;&quot;&quot;편의 함수: 목표(+히스토리)+스크린샷으로 바로 1회 호출. [5단계] history 추가&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return self.create(initial_input(goal, screenshot, history),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                           previous_interaction_id)</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/cua/prompt.py b/cua/prompt.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..b54db32</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/cua/prompt.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;System prompt for the Gemini Computer Use mobile agent.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+Computer Use 모델은 액션(click/type/...)을 이미 알고 있으므로,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+프롬프트에서 액션을 나열할 필요가 없다. 목표 수행에 필요한</span>
+<span class="dl add">+최소한의 지시만 담는다. (GitHub 레퍼런스 agent.py 기반)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+SYSTEM_PROMPT = &quot;&quot;&quot;You are operating an Android phone.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+* Use the provided tools to complete the task.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+* Scroll down to inspect the full screen before assuming an element is missing.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+* You can open apps by package name from anywhere.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+* Type text only using the `type` tool. Do not use the virtual keyboard.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+* If the task is already complete, state that directly.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/live/__init__.py b/live/__init__.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..cd45e08</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/live/__init__.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;live — 실제 안드로이드 기기(에뮬레이터/폰)에서 CU 에이전트를 실행.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+판단은 cua/ 코어가, 실제 조작(캡처·탭)은 adb_bridge 가 담당한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+benchmark 무관 (평가는 mobibench/cu_agent.py 가 담당).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/live/adb_bridge.py b/live/adb_bridge.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..cd5f6b5</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/live/adb_bridge.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;ADB로 안드로이드 기기(에뮬레이터/실제 폰)를 제어하는 실행부.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+[신규 · 라이브] cua/ 판단 코어와 분리 — 판단은 cua가, 실제 조작(캡처·탭·입력)은</span>
+<span class="dl add">+여기가 담당한다. (GitHub 레퍼런스 agent.py 의 ADBBridge 기반)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+CU 액션 이름(click/type/drag_and_drop/...)과 동일한 이름의 메서드를 두어,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+main 에서 getattr(bridge, action.name)(**action.args) 로 바로 디스패치한다.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+좌표는 CU의 0-1000 정규화 → 기기 실제 픽셀로 변환(cua.denormalize).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+사전 준비: ADB 설치 + 기기 연결(`adb devices`로 확인).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import re</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import subprocess</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import sys</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import time</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from shutil import which</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# cua 코어 import 를 위해 repo 루트를 경로에 추가</span>
+<span class="dl add">+_REPO_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if _REPO_ROOT not in sys.path:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    sys.path.insert(0, _REPO_ROOT)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from cua import denormalize</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def _resolve_adb() -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;adb 실행 파일 위치. PATH에 있으면 그걸, 없으면 기본 Android SDK 위치.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    → PATH를 설정 안 해도 동작 (Android Studio 기본 설치 경로 자동 탐색).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if which(&quot;adb&quot;):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return &quot;adb&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    candidate = os.path.join(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        os.environ.get(&quot;LOCALAPPDATA&quot;, &quot;&quot;),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        &quot;Android&quot;, &quot;Sdk&quot;, &quot;platform-tools&quot;, &quot;adb.exe&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    if os.path.exists(candidate):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return candidate</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    return &quot;adb&quot;  # 못 찾으면 PATH 가정 (에러 시 사용자 안내)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+ADB_BIN = _resolve_adb()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+class ADBBridge:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    &quot;&quot;&quot;ADB 명령으로 안드로이드 기기를 캡처·조작한다.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def __init__(self, device_id: str | None = None):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 여러 기기가 붙어 있으면 device_id 로 지정 (adb -s)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # ADB_BIN: PATH 또는 기본 SDK 위치에서 자동 탐색된 adb</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self.prefix = [ADB_BIN] + ([&quot;-s&quot;, device_id] if device_id else [])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self.width, self.height = self._screen_size()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    # ── 내부 유틸 ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def _run(self, args, check=True) -&gt; str:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        result = subprocess.run(self.prefix + args, capture_output=True, text=True)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if check and result.returncode != 0:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            raise RuntimeError(f&quot;ADB error: {result.stderr.strip()}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return result.stdout</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def _screen_size(self) -&gt; tuple[int, int]:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 화면 해상도를 동적으로 읽음 → 에뮬/실폰 무관, 코드 수정 없이 적응</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        out = self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;wm&quot;, &quot;size&quot;])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        m = re.search(r&quot;Physical size: (\d+)x(\d+)&quot;, out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return (int(m.group(1)), int(m.group(2))) if m else (1080, 2400)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def screenshot(self) -&gt; bytes:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        res = subprocess.run(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            self.prefix + [&quot;exec-out&quot;, &quot;screencap&quot;, &quot;-p&quot;], capture_output=True</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return res.stdout</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    # ── CU 액션 핸들러 (메서드명 = CU 액션명, **_ 로 intent 등 흡수) ──</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def click(self, x, y, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        px, py = denormalize(x, y, self.width, self.height)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;tap&quot;, str(px), str(py)])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def type(self, text, press_enter=False, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # adb input text 는 공백을 %s 로 넣어야 함</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;text&quot;, str(text).replace(&quot; &quot;, &quot;%s&quot;)])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if press_enter:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;keyevent&quot;, &quot;66&quot;])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def long_press(self, x, y, seconds=2, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        px, py = denormalize(x, y, self.width, self.height)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;swipe&quot;, str(px), str(py),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                   str(px), str(py), str(int(seconds * 1000))])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def drag_and_drop(self, start_x, start_y, end_x, end_y, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        sx, sy = denormalize(start_x, start_y, self.width, self.height)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        ex, ey = denormalize(end_x, end_y, self.width, self.height)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;swipe&quot;, str(sx), str(sy),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                   str(ex), str(ey), &quot;300&quot;])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def press_key(self, key, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        keymap = {&quot;home&quot;: &quot;3&quot;, &quot;back&quot;: &quot;4&quot;, &quot;enter&quot;: &quot;66&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                  &quot;app_switch&quot;: &quot;187&quot;, &quot;menu&quot;: &quot;82&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;keyevent&quot;, keymap.get(str(key).lower(), str(key))])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def go_back(self, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;input&quot;, &quot;keyevent&quot;, &quot;4&quot;])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def open_app(self, app_name=None, package_name=None, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        pkg = app_name or package_name</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if not pkg:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            raise ValueError(&quot;open_app requires app_name or package_name&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        out = self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;monkey&quot;, &quot;-p&quot;, pkg, &quot;-c&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                         &quot;android.intent.category.LAUNCHER&quot;, &quot;1&quot;], check=False)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if &quot;No activities found&quot; in out or &quot;monkey aborted&quot; in out:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            raise RuntimeError(f&quot;App {pkg} is not installed or has no launcher.&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def list_apps(self, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        out = self._run([&quot;shell&quot;, &quot;pm&quot;, &quot;list&quot;, &quot;packages&quot;, &quot;-3&quot;])</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        apps = [l.split(&quot;:&quot;, 1)[1] for l in out.splitlines() if l.startswith(&quot;package:&quot;)]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return {&quot;apps&quot;: apps or &quot;No third-party apps installed.&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def wait(self, seconds=1, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        time.sleep(seconds)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def take_screenshot(self, **_):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 다음 턴에 어차피 새 스크린샷을 보내므로 별도 동작 없음</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        return None</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/live/main.py b/live/main.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..f7cb0b3</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/live/main.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;라이브 CU 에이전트 — 실제 안드로이드 기기에서 앱을 자동 조작.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+[신규 · 라이브] 루프: 캡처(ADB) → 판단(cua) → 실행(ADB) → 반복.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+(GitHub 레퍼런스 agent.py 의 멀티턴 루프 구조 기반)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+실행:  python live/main.py &quot;작업 설명&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+예:    python live/main.py &quot;설정 앱을 열어서 다크모드를 켜&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+사전:  ADB + 에뮬레이터/폰 연결 (adb devices 로 확인), .env 에 GEMINI_API_KEY</span>
+<span class="dl add">+&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import sys</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import time</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+_REPO_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if _REPO_ROOT not in sys.path:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    sys.path.insert(0, _REPO_ROOT)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)  # 윈도우 콘솔 유니코드</span>
+<span class="dl add">+except Exception:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    pass</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from dotenv import load_dotenv</span>
+<span class="dl add">+load_dotenv(os.path.join(_REPO_ROOT, &quot;.env&quot;))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from cua import (</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    CUClient, initial_input, function_result, parse_actions, is_done, final_text,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from live.adb_bridge import ADBBridge</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+SETTLE_SEC = 0.6  # 액션 후 화면이 안정될 때까지 대기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def run(task: str, max_turns: int = 30):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    client = CUClient()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    bridge = ADBBridge()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;기기 해상도: {bridge.width}x{bridge.height}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(f&quot;작업: {task}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(&quot;-&quot; * 50)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    # 첫 턴: 목표 + 현재 스크린샷</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    interaction = client.create(initial_input(task, bridge.screenshot()))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    prev_id = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for turn in range(1, max_turns + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 완료 판정 = function_call 없음</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if is_done(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(&quot;\n[완료]&quot;, final_text(interaction) or &quot;(작업 완료)&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            return</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 이번 턴의 액션들을 실행하고 결과(새 스크린샷)를 모음</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        results = []</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for action in parse_actions(interaction):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(f&quot;[턴 {turn}] {action.name}({action.args})&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;ok&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            handler = getattr(bridge, action.name, None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if handler is None:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: f&quot;Unknown action: {action.name}&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            else:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    out = handler(**action.args)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    if isinstance(out, dict):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                        data.update(out)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                except Exception as e:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                    data = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;, &quot;error&quot;: str(e)}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            safety_ack = &quot;safety_decision&quot; in action.args  # 데모: 자동 승인</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            time.sleep(SETTLE_SEC)                          # 화면 안정 대기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            shot = bridge.screenshot()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            results.append(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                function_result(action.name, action.call_id, shot, data, safety_ack)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if not results:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            break</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 실행 결과를 되돌려주고 다음 턴 (previous_interaction_id 로 맥락 이어감)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        interaction = client.create(results, previous_interaction_id=prev_id)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        prev_id = interaction.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    print(&quot;\n[중단] 최대 턴 도달&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+if __name__ == &quot;__main__&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    task_desc = &quot; &quot;.join(sys.argv[1:]) or &quot;Open the Settings app&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    run(task_desc)</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/mobile_agent/agent.py b/mobile_agent/agent.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..f52b38c</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/mobile_agent/agent.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,125 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import os,time</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from dotenv import load_dotenv</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from google import genai</span>
+<span class="dl add">+from google.genai import types,errors</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import device</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+load_dotenv()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+client = genai.Client(api_key=os.getenv(&quot;GEMINI_API_KEY&quot;))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# [vs quickstart] quickstart는 모든 액션을 구현(list_apps/take_screenshot 포함). 우린 안 쓰는 2개를 excluded로 아예 차단.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+tools = [types.Tool(computer_use=types.ComputerUse(environment=types.Environment.ENVIRONMENT_MOBILE,excluded_predefined_functions=[&quot;list_apps&quot;, &quot;take_screenshot&quot;],))]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+SYSTEM_PROMPT = &quot;&quot;&quot;You are an agent operating a real Android phone. You see a screenshot each step and issue one UI action.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+Rules:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- The current screenshot is the ground truth. The action history is only intent and may have failed — always re-check the screen before acting.  # 화면=절대 사실(open_app 성공 착각해서 헤매는 거 방지)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- Do NOT invent products, brands, or names that are not in the task or visible on screen. If the task names no specific item, do not guess one — stop and ask.  # RESCENE 환각 차단</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- Before concluding something is missing, scroll to check the whole screen.  # 스크롤 강제(성급한 판정 방지)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- You can open any app directly by its package name with open_app.  # package로 직접 앱 열기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- Enter text only with the type tool, never by tapping the on-screen keyboard.  # type 도구만 쓰기(한글·특수문자 안전)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+- If the task is ambiguous, impossible, or already done, stop and say so instead of guessing.&quot;&quot;&quot;  # 모호·불가·완료면 멈추기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+cfg = types.GenerateContentConfig(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    tools=tools,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    system_instruction=SYSTEM_PROMPT,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    temperature=0.0,  # 같은 화면이면 같은 판단 — 무작위 헤맴·환각 감소.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+TASK = input(&quot;어떤 작업이 필요하신가요?&quot;).strip()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+bridge = device.ADBBridge()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+bridge.enable_adb_keyboard()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+img = bridge.screenshot()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+contents = [types.Content(role=&quot;user&quot;,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                          parts=[types.Part(text=TASK),</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                                 types.Part.from_bytes(data=img, mime_type=&quot;image/png&quot;),])]</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# [vs quickstart] quickstart엔 재시도 로직이 없음 — 우리만의 안전장치(429/5xx일 때 대기 후 재시도).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+def generate_with_retry(contents,max_tries=4):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for attempt in range(1, max_tries + 1):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        try:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            # [vs quickstart] API 방식이 다름: 우린 generate_content + contents를 직접 누적(히스토리를 내가 관리).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            #   quickstart는 client.interactions.create + previous_interaction_id(히스토리를 서버가 관리).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            #   → 우리 방식이라야 재시도 유지 + 나중에 히스토리 가지치기(토큰 절감)가 가능.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            return client.models.generate_content(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                model=&quot;gemini-3.5-flash&quot;,contents=contents,config=cfg</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        except errors.APIError as e:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if e.code == 429 or e.code &gt;= 500:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                wait = 2 * attempt</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                print(f&quot; API 에러 {e.code} - {wait}초 후 재시도({attempt}/{max_tries})&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                time.sleep(wait)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            else :</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                raise</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    raise RuntimeError(f&quot;API 재시도 {max_tries}회 초과 - 중단&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# [vs quickstart] 우린 for range + for-else로 최대스텝(30) 도달을 판정. quickstart는 while turn &lt; max_turns(=100).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+try :  # 완료·에러·최대스텝·거부 어디서 끝나든 무조건 원래 키보드 복원하려고 try/finally 래핑.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    for step in range(1,16):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        resp = generate_with_retry(contents)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        Show_Usage = False</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if Show_Usage:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(resp.usage_metadata)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        model_content = resp.candidates[0].content</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # 응답에서 액션 찾기</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        fc = None</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        for part in (model_content.parts or []):</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if part.function_call:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                fc = part.function_call</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            elif part.text:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                print(f&quot;[{step}] {part.text}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if fc is None:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(&quot;작업 완료!&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            break</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(f&quot;[{step}] 액션: {fc.name}  {dict(fc.args)}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        args = dict(fc.args)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # [vs quickstart] 안전확인: quickstart는 묻지 않고 자동 승인(safety_acknowledgement=True).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        #   우린 사용자에게 y/n 확인 후 진행 — 우리 쪽이 더 안전(HITL).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        ack=False</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        sd=args.get(&quot;safety_decision&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if sd and sd.get(&quot;decision&quot;) == &quot;require_confirmation&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            print(f&quot; 확인 필요 : {sd.get(&#x27;explanation&#x27;)}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            answer = input(&quot; 실행할까요 (y/n)&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            if answer.strip().lower() != &quot;y&quot;:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                print(&quot; 사용자가 거부 -&gt; 중단&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                break</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            ack = True</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        contents.append(model_content)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        # [vs quickstart] getattr dispatch + try/except는 quickstart에서 차용(예전 run_action if/elif 대체).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        #   실패해도 크래시 대신 error를 모델에 되먹여 자가복구 유도 → 실전에서 한글입력 실패 우회로 검증됨.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        handler = getattr(bridge,fc.name,None)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if handler is None:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            result = {&quot;status&quot;: &quot;error&quot;,&quot;error&quot; : f&quot;미지원 액션 : {fc.name}&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        else : </span>
+<span class="dl add">+            try : </span>
+<span class="dl add">+                handler (**args)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                result = {&quot;status&quot; : &quot;ok&quot;}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            except Exception as e:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                result = {&quot;status&quot; : &quot;error&quot;,&quot;error&quot;: str(e)}</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                print(f&quot; ! 액션 실패 : {e}&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        time.sleep(0.5)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        payload = result</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if ack:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            payload[&quot;safety_acknowledgement&quot;] = &quot;true&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        new_img = bridge.screenshot()</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        </span>
+<span class="dl add">+        feedback = types.FunctionResponse(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            name=fc.name,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            response= payload,</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            parts=[types.FunctionResponsePart.from_bytes(</span>
+<span class="dl add">+                data=new_img, mime_type=&quot;image/png&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            )],</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        )</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        if fc.id:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+            feedback.id = fc.id</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        contents.append(types.Content(role=&quot;user&quot;, parts=[types.Part(function_response=feedback)]))</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    else :</span>
+<span class="dl add">+        print(&quot;최대 스텝 도달 - 작업 미완료 중단&quot;)</span>
+<span class="dl add">+finally :</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    bridge.restore_keyboard()  # 사용자가 원래 키보드로 타이핑 가능하게 복원.</span>
+<span class="dl ctx">\ No newline at end of file</span>
+<span class="dl meta">diff --git a/mobile_agent/device.py b/mobile_agent/device.py</span>
+<span class="dl meta">new file mode 100644</span>
+<span class="dl meta">index 0000000..62a99de</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">--- /dev/null</span>
+<span class="dl fhead">+++ b/mobile_agent/device.py</span>
+<span class="dl hunk">@@ -0,0 +1,131 @@</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import subprocess</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import base64</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import time</span>
+<span class="dl add">+import re</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+ADB = r&quot;C:\Users\shimw\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe&quot;</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+</span>
+<span class="dl add">+# [vs quickstart] 구조: quickstart는 agent.py 한 파일에 ADBBridge를 넣지만, 우린 device.py로 분리(관심사 분리).</span>
+<span class="dl add">+#   _run 헬퍼 / 액션메서드=액션이름+**_ / _px 좌표변환 은 quickstart 패턴을 차용한 것.</span>
+<span class="dl add">+class ADBBridge:</span>
+<span class="dl add">+    def __init__(self, device_id=None):</span>
